product.name: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e X-Charge Battery 20V 4Ah 80Wh, Bidirectional USB-C, LED, USB-C Cable Included
product.description:
The RURIS ALFA UP 2400e X-Charge battery (20V, 4Ah, 80Wh) powers the entire RURIS 20V tool range. Its 21700 cells deliver up to 30% more runtime than standard batteries of the same format, and its bidirectional USB-C port lets you recharge it from any USB-C source or power your mobile devices. The ALFA UP system protects against critical discharge. Supplied with a 1 m USB-C cable.
• Battery and power bank in one: bidirectional USB-C port to recharge the battery without a dedicated charger and power smartphones or tablets directly, in the garden or on the go. • Compatible with the RURIS 20V range: fits blowers, brush cutters, chainsaws, lawn mowers and other RURIS 20V cordless tools, with a light weight of just 0.64 kg. • High-density 21700 cells: up to 30% more runtime than standard batteries of the same format, for extended work sessions. • ALFA UP system: protection against critical discharge and battery recovery even after several months of storage, to safeguard your investment. • Box contents: 1 ALFA UP 2400e X-Charge battery 20V 4Ah 80Wh with 3-level LED display and 1 USB-C to USB-C cable, 1 m.

product.name: RURIS ALFA UP 6400e VoltX Battery 60V 4Ah 240Wh, 21700 Cells, Digital Percentage Display
product.description:
The RURIS ALFA UP 6400e battery (60V, 4Ah, 240Wh) powers the tools of the RURIS VoltX high-voltage platform: brush cutters, chainsaws, blowers. Its 21700 cells maintain constant torque in dense grass or hard wood, and its digital display shows the exact charge level in percent. The ALFA UP system enables recovery after 6 to 12 months of storage. Weight: 1.5 kg.
• 60V high-voltage platform: 240Wh to power RURIS VoltX tools at full power in dense grass, thick brush or hard wood, without any drop in speed. • Digital percentage display: exact charge level from 1 to 100%, far more precise than a segmented LED indicator, so you can plan your sessions and avoid unexpected stops. • New-generation 21700 cells: around 30% more runtime than standard 18650 cells, with a stable current flow under heavy load. • ALFA UP system: protection against critical discharge and battery recovery after 6 to 12 months of storage in a discharged state, to protect your investment. • Compatible with the VoltX 60V range: dedicated battery for brush cutters, chainsaws, blowers and other RURIS VoltX machines; controlled weight of 1.5 kg.

product.name: RURIS ALFA UP 6800e VoltX Battery 60V 8Ah 480Wh, 21700 Cells, Digital Percentage Display
product.description:
The RURIS ALFA UP 6800e battery (60V, 8Ah, 480Wh) is the maximum-runtime solution of the VoltX 60V platform, designed for intensive work on large areas. Its 21700 cells deliver stable current right to the end of discharge, and the digital display shows the exact charge level in percent. The ALFA UP system enables recovery after 6 to 12 months of storage. Weight: 2.7 kg.
• 480Wh of maximum runtime: 8Ah capacity for long, uninterrupted work sessions, ideal for large areas in sustained or semi-professional use. • Stable current to the very end: the 21700 cells maintain motor speed even as the battery approaches 0%, for a clean cut down to the last metre. • Digital percentage display: exact charge level from 1 to 100% to manage remaining runtime precisely and avoid any unexpected stop mid-task. • ALFA UP system: protection against critical discharge and recovery after 6 to 12 months of storage in a discharged state, with no premature battery replacement. • Compatible with the entire VoltX 60V range: brush cutters, chainsaws, blowers and other RURIS VoltX tools; rugged construction for intensive loads.

product.name: RURIS Vulcano 300S – Electric Fan Heater 230 V, Adjustable Thermostat, for Workshop and Garage
product.description:
The RURIS Vulcano 300S electric fan heater quickly warms workshops, garages, greenhouses and work spaces thanks to its heating element and fan, which spread an even heat with no combustion and no smoke. The adjustable thermostat maintains the desired temperature and prevents excessive energy consumption. Compact and fitted with a handle, it moves easily to wherever it is needed.
• Instant heat without combustion: the electric heating element and fan quickly spread even heat, with no smoke and no fuel to store. • Versatile: ideal for spot heating of workshops, garages, greenhouses and work spaces, and for protecting crops from frost. • Adjustable thermostat: automatically maintains the desired temperature and limits energy consumption; several heat levels available. • Compact and mobile: small footprint with a carry handle to move it easily from room to room and store it without clutter. • Simple to use: runs on 230 V mains power with no installation required; just plug it in and enjoy instant heat.

product.name: RURIS 8024e – Cordless Pressure Washer 20V, 30 Bar, 5 L/min, Self-Priming, USB-C Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS 8024e cordless pressure washer is completely self-sufficient: its self-priming system with float draws water from a bucket, a canister or any water source, with no tap and no power outlet needed. With 30 bar and a 5 L/min flow rate, it cleans your car, bike, garden furniture and tools. Ultra-light (1.5 kg), supplied in a carry case with a 6-in-1 nozzle and a RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with USB-C charging included.
• Effective pressure: 20V brushless motor delivering up to 30 bar and 5 L/min for fast cleaning of lightly to moderately soiled surfaces. • Total independence: self-priming system with 5 m hose, filter and float to draw water from a bucket, a canister or a pool, no tap required. • Adjustable 6-in-1 nozzle: switch from a concentrated jet to a wide spray with a simple twist; pinpoint/fan jet nozzle and foam container included. • Ultra-portable: just 1.5 kg, easy to handle with one hand, ideal for camping, the car park or mountain biking, supplied with a carry case. • Battery included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C charging, also usable as a power bank.

product.name: RURIS AS140MMA – Inverter Welding Machine 140A, MMA, Hot Start, Anti Stick, Arc Force, Digital Display
product.description:
The RURIS AS140MMA inverter welding machine delivers up to 140 A for MMA welding with coated electrodes (1.6 to 3.2 mm) on all types of steel. Its Hot Start, Anti Stick and Arc Force functions make striking the arc easier and keep it stable, while the digital display allows precise current adjustment. Compact (4.9 kg), it comes with a mask, clamps, hammer/brush, 2.5 mm rutile electrodes (2.5 kg) and a magnetic square.
• 140 A inverter with digital display: precise current control for clean, even weld seams on all types of steel. • Smart functions: Hot Start for easy arc ignition, Anti Stick to prevent electrode sticking and Arc Force for a stable arc even at short distance. • Electrodes from 1.6 to 3.2 mm: compatible with rutile and basic electrodes, for repairs, the workshop, the farm and DIY at home. • Light and mobile: only 4.9 kg, with handle and carry strap so you can weld anywhere, powered from 230 V mains. • Box contents: welding machine, mask, hammer/brush, earth clamp, electrode holder, 2.5 mm rutile electrodes (2.5 kg) and magnetic square.

product.name: RURIS AS180MMA – Inverter Welding Machine 180A, MMA, Hot Start, Anti Stick, Arc Force, Digital Display
product.description:
The RURIS AS180MMA inverter welding machine delivers up to 180 A for MMA welding with coated electrodes from 2.5 to 4 mm on various types of steel. Hot Start, Anti Stick and Arc Force guarantee instant arc ignition and a stable arc, with a digital display for precise current adjustment. Lightweight (5.1 kg), it comes with two masks, gloves, hammer/brush, clamps and 3.2 mm electrodes (2.5 kg). Ideal for the workshop, the farm and maintenance work.
• 180 A inverter with digital display: precise electronic current control for clean, reliable welds, even on demanding jobs. • Advanced functions: Hot Start for instant arc ignition, Anti Stick to prevent electrode sticking and Arc Force for perfect stability with a short arc. • Electrodes from 2.5 to 4 mm: compatible with rutile and basic electrodes, suited to different steels and welding applications in the workshop or on site. • Compact and portable: only 5.1 kg, with handle and strap for easy transport, powered from 230 V mains. • Box contents: standard mask and professional mask, hammer/brush, earth clamp, electrode holder, 3.2 mm electrodes (2.5 kg) and welding gloves.

product.name: RURIS AS200MMA – Inverter Welding Machine 200A, MMA, Hot Start, Anti Stick, Arc Force, Digital Display
product.description:
The RURIS AS200MMA inverter welding machine delivers up to 200 A for coated-electrode welding (2.5 to 4 mm) of stainless steel, alloy steel or carbon steel. Hot Start, Anti Stick and Arc Force ensure fast arc ignition and a stable arc, with a digital display for precise current control. Compact (5.6 kg), it comes fully equipped: masks, gloves, apron, clamps, hammer/brush, 3.2 mm electrodes (2.5 kg) and a magnetic square.
• 200 A inverter with digital display: high power and precise current control for durable welds on a wide range of metals. • Smart functions: Hot Start for fast arc ignition, Anti Stick to prevent electrode sticking and Arc Force for smooth welding even with a short arc. • Electrodes from 2.5 to 4 mm: rutile and basic, for welding stainless steel, alloy steel, carbon steel and other common metals. • Compact and rugged: 5.6 kg, ergonomic design with handle and strap, ideal in the workshop, on the farm or at home, powered from 230 V mains. • Box contents: standard and professional masks, gloves, apron, hammer/brush, clamps, 3.2 mm electrodes (2.5 kg) and magnetic square.

product.name: RURIS OS345 – Oscillating Garden Sprinkler 345 m², 18 Adjustable Nozzles, 110° Angle, Adjustable Flow
product.description:
The RURIS OS345 oscillating sprinkler waters lawns, flower beds and vegetable gardens evenly, with coverage of up to 345 m². Its 18 flexible nozzles with adjustable direction and its oscillation angle of up to 110° let you fine-tune the watered area, while the adjustable flow rate adapts to the weather. Built from aluminium, ABS and POM, lightweight (0.68 kg), it operates at a water pressure of 2 to 4 bar.
• Wide coverage: up to 345 m² watered thanks to 18 flexible plastic nozzles and an adjustable oscillation angle of up to 110°. • Precise control: adjustable flow rate and adjustable nozzle direction to match the watering to the shape of your garden and the weather. • Durable construction: body made of aluminium, ABS and POM combining strength and light weight (0.68 kg), dimensions 47.3 x 12.9 x 9.7 cm. • Easy maintenance: nozzle-cleaning needle built into the end of the oscillating tube for consistent performance over time. • Ready to use: adapter included for quick connection to the hose; operates from 2 to 4 bar and from 5 to 35 °C.

product.name: RURIS UFO200 – Rotating Sprinkler for Lawns and Vegetable Gardens, Adjustable Range, Quick Hose Connection
product.description:
The RURIS UFO200 rotating sprinkler distributes water evenly over lawns, flower beds and vegetable gardens thanks to its steady rotation. Its adjustable range lets you set the watered area for even irrigation with no supervision. It connects to the garden hose in one simple move and runs on mains water pressure, with no electricity, for easy care of your green spaces.
• Even watering by rotation: distributes water uniformly over a large circular area, for lawns watered with no dry spots. • Versatile: suitable for lawns, flower beds and vegetable gardens; waters unattended while you get on with other tasks. • Adjustable range: the watered zone adjusts to the area to be covered, saving water and precisely targeting your plantings. • No electricity: works solely on mains water pressure; lightweight, simple to set up and move around the garden. • Box contents: UFO200 rotating sprinkler, connecting directly to a standard garden hose.

product.name: RURIS ZN450 – Oscillating Sprinkler for Large Lawns, Adjustable Watering Width, Quick Connection
product.description:
The RURIS ZN450 oscillating sprinkler covers large rectangular areas with a steady sweeping motion, ideal for lawns and vegetable gardens. Its adjustable watering width lets you match the covered zone to your plot and spread the water evenly, with no dry patches. It connects quickly to the garden hose and works on mains water pressure alone, with no electricity.
• Wide, even coverage: oscillating sweep that waters large rectangular areas with no dry spots, for a green, even lawn. • Versatile in the garden: ideal for large lawns, vegetable gardens and flower beds, with no supervision needed while watering. • Adjustable watering width: the covered zone adjusts to the shape and size of the plot, avoiding water waste. • Simple and reliable: runs on mains water pressure, with no electrical parts; lightweight and easy to move from one area to another. • Box contents: ZN450 oscillating sprinkler, connecting directly to a standard garden hose.

product.name: RURIS AR99S Portable Electric Mist Blower 99000ARS25A, Attachment for Electric Sprayers, Garden Treatments
product.description:
The RURIS AR99s portable electric mist blower sprays a fine mist that covers foliage evenly: ideal for plant protection treatments, liquid fertilisers and disinfection in the garden, orchard or vineyard. Lightweight (1.95 kg) and easy to handle, it runs on a built-in rechargeable battery, supplied with the unit, so you can treat crops and green spaces cordlessly and effortlessly.
• Fine covering mist: spreads the product evenly over foliage for effective plant protection treatments and liquid fertiliser applications. • Versatile: suited to the garden, orchard and vineyard, as well as space disinfection, for gardeners, fruit growers and winegrowers. • Built-in rechargeable battery included: cord-free runtime to treat freely, with no fuel mixing and no emissions. • Light and easy to handle: just 1.95 kg, a handheld format for long spraying sessions without fatigue, with an effective reach over crops. • Ready to use: integrated product tank and fine-mist spray nozzle for even application from the very first use.

product.name: RURIS A109S – Petrol Backpack Mist Blower 3HP, 14L Tank, 12 m Range + Protective Equipment Kit
product.description:
The RURIS A109S petrol backpack mist blower features a 3 HP 2-stroke engine and a 14 L tank compatible with both liquids and granules. Its 12 m horizontal range (10 m vertical), 4 spray levels and 90° booster pump treat orchards, vineyards and field crops effectively. Padded shoulder straps and a START/STOP handle for comfort. Supplied with a protection kit: mask, goggles, coveralls and ear defenders.
• 3 HP 2-stroke petrol engine: electronic ignition, 1.4 L fuel tank and 100 km/h air outlet speed for powerful spraying. • Long range: 12 m horizontal and 10 m vertical, with a booster pump enabling spraying at 90°, ideal for treating trees. • Versatile 14 L tank: compatible with liquids and granules, 4 spray levels (mist, droplets, jet) and a 6-hole injector nozzle kit. • Carrying comfort: padded shoulder straps, cushioned back panel and ergonomic multifunction START/STOP handle for long treatment sessions. • Box contents: mist blower, liquid filter and 6-hole nozzle kit, plus a protection kit with mask, goggles, coveralls and ear defenders.

product.name: RURIS RMX25050 – SDS MAX Demolition Hammer 1700 W, 45 J, 2100 bpm, Anti-Vibration + 2 Chisels
product.description:
The RURIS RMX25050 demolition hammer delivers 45 J of impact energy at 2100 blows per minute thanks to its 1700 W motor with copper windings. With its SDS MAX chuck, 360° rotating handle, adjustable speed and anti-vibration system, it makes short work of reinforced concrete, masonry and stone. Supplied with an 18 mm pointed chisel and flat chisel, spare carbon brushes, grease and an Allen key.
• 45 J of impact at 2100 blows/min: 1700 W motor with copper windings to demolish reinforced concrete, masonry and stone. • Professional SDS MAX chuck: stable, rugged chisel mounting, with fast tool-free accessory changes. • Adjustable speed and Lock-On function: impact intensity matched to the material and a locked switch for continuous work. • Enhanced comfort: 360° rotating auxiliary handle and an anti-vibration system that reduces fatigue over long sessions. • Complete kit included: 18 mm pointed chisel, 18 mm flat chisel, auxiliary handle, spare carbon brushes, tube of grease and Allen key.

product.name: RURIS RMX1210 – Cordless SDS Plus Rotary Hammer 20V, 1.5 J, LED, 20V 4Ah USB-C Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX1210 SDS Plus cordless rotary hammer drills into concrete up to 16 mm, wood up to 25 mm and metal up to 10 mm thanks to its 1.5 J of impact energy, 900 rpm and 5100 blows/min. Compact (1.4 kg), with variable speed, reverse function and LED light. Supplied with the RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C charging (cable included, no mains charger required) and 3 SDS Plus drill bits, 8/10/12 mm.
• SDS Plus drilling and hammer action: 1.5 J of impact energy, 900 rpm and 5100 blows/min to drill concrete up to 16 mm, wood up to 25 mm and metal up to 10 mm. • 20V 4Ah battery included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e battery with bidirectional USB-C charging, rechargeable from any USB-C port and usable as a power bank for your mobile devices. • Quick-lock SDS Plus chuck: tool-free bit changes, variable speed and reverse function for total drilling control. • Compact and easy to handle: just 1.4 kg with a built-in LED light, ideal for fixing shelves, curtain rails and light fittings into concrete or brick. • Box contents: RMX1210 rotary hammer, 20V 4Ah USB-C battery with cable, 3 SDS Plus drill bits (8/10/12 mm); USB-C charging with no dedicated mains charger.

product.name: RURIS RMX2813 – Brushless SDS Plus Rotary Hammer Drill 20V, 2.8 J, 20V 4Ah USB-C Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX2813 cordless rotary hammer drill with brushless motor drills concrete up to 26 mm, wood up to 30 mm and metal up to 13 mm with 2.8 J of impact energy. Four functions: drilling, hammer drilling, chiselling and VarioLock. Supplied with the RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C charging (cable included, no mains charger), 3 SDS Plus drill bits and a depth stop.
• Brushless power: 2.8 J of impact, 1150 rpm and 5100 blows/min to drill concrete up to 26 mm, wood up to 30 mm and metal up to 13 mm without losing speed. • 20V 4Ah battery included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e battery with bidirectional USB-C charging, rechargeable from any USB-C port and usable as a power bank for your mobile devices. • 4 functions including VarioLock: drilling, hammer drilling and chiselling, with chisel locking at the optimal angle to break tiles or remove mortar with precision. • Controlled work: depth stop, variable speed and LED light for consistent drilling; well-balanced 2.7 kg weight. • Box contents: RMX2813 rotary hammer, 20V 4Ah USB-C battery with cable, 3 SDS Plus drill bits (8/10/12 mm), depth stop; USB-C charging without a mains charger.

product.name: RURIS RMX4526 – SDS Plus Rotary Hammer Drill 1050W, 4.5 J, 3 Functions, Concrete Drilling + Accessories
product.description:
The RURIS RMX4526 rotary hammer drill combines three functions: normal drilling, hammer drilling and chiselling. Its 1050 W motor with copper winding delivers 4.5 J at 4200 blows per minute, with a drilling capacity in concrete of up to 42 mm. Lightweight (4.5 kg) and ergonomic, it comes with pointed and flat 14 mm chisels, 3 SDS Plus drill bits, a depth stop and maintenance accessories.
• 1050 W motor with copper winding: 4.5 J of impact energy at 4200 blows/min for drilling and chiselling concrete, masonry and stone. • 3 functions in 1: normal drilling, hammer drilling and chiselling to cover the majority of construction jobs. • Quick-change SDS Plus chuck: accessories swapped without tools, with concrete drilling up to 42 mm. • Refined ergonomics: only 4.5 kg, vibration-absorbing handle and depth stop for consistent drilling. • Complete kit: pointed and flat 14 mm chisels, 3 drill bits 8/10/12 mm, auxiliary handle, carbon brushes, dust guard, grease and wrench.

product.name: RURIS AirPower 2400PLUS – Air Compressor 1500W 2HP, 24L Tank, 8 bar, 180 L/min + Accessory Kit
product.description:
The RURIS AirPower 2400PLUS piston air compressor pairs a 230 V electric motor rated at 1500 W (2 HP) with a 24 L tank, delivering a maximum pressure of 8 bar and an air flow of 180 L/min. Copper tubes, two outlets with individual pressure gauges, a noise-reducing cover and 5-inch wheels for mobility. Supplied as a pack with an accessory kit: blow gun, paint spray gun, washing gun, inflation gun and spiral hose.
• Solid performance: 1500 W (2 HP) electric motor at 2850 rpm, maximum pressure of 8 bar and air flow up to 180 L/min for common pneumatic tools. • Versatile every day: inflating, blowing, painting, washing and cleaning in the workshop, garage or at home thanks to the supplied accessory kit. • Two air outlets with individual pressure gauges: precisely controlled pressure and the option to connect two tools, with durable copper air tubes. • Comfort and mobility: cover reducing piston noise, ergonomic handle and 5-inch wheels to move the 24 L tank easily. • Box contents: compressor, blow gun, paint spray gun, washing gun, inflation gun and spiral hose.

product.name: RURIS Silent Power 2400 – Silent Oil-Free Compressor 1500W, 24L Tank, 236 L/min, 8 bar
product.description:
The RURIS Silent Power 2400OilFree silent oil-free compressor delivers clean compressed air thanks to its oil-free technology: ideal for workshops, garages and noise-sensitive spaces. Its 1500 W (2 HP) motor on 230 V drives 2 cylinders for a flow rate of 236 L/min, with a 24 L tank and a maximum pressure of 8 bar. Two outlets with independent pressure gauges, overload and overheating protection, 5-inch wheels and a detachable handle. 22 kg.
• High flow rate of 236 L/min: 1500 W (2 HP) motor and 2 cylinders for fast, even compression, 24 L tank and maximum pressure of 8 bar. • Oil-free, clean air: no oil changes or lubrication, compressed air free of contaminants, suited to workshops, clinics, laboratories and commercial spaces. • Two independent outlets with individual pressure gauges: power two pneumatic tools at the same time with separately set pressures. • Enhanced safety: motor overload and overheating protection, built-in safety valve for intensive, risk-free use. • Mobile and compact: sturdy 5-inch wheels, detachable handle with hose holder and a contained weight of 22 kg for easy movement around the workshop.

product.name: RURIS Silent Power 5000 – Silent Oil-Free Compressor 1500W, 50L Tank, 236 L/min, 8 bar
product.description:
The RURIS Silent Power 5000OilFree silent oil-free compressor combines a large 50 L tank with a 236 L/min flow rate for a continuous air supply, even during prolonged use. Its 1500 W (2 HP) motor on 230 V drives 2 cylinders and delivers up to 8 bar, with no oil and no contaminants. Two outlets with independent pressure gauges, overload and overheating protection, large 6-inch wheels and a detachable handle. 28 kg.
• Long-lasting air supply: 50 L tank, 236 L/min flow rate and maximum pressure of 8 bar to power paint spray guns, impact drivers and inflators without interruption. • Oil-free, clean air: no oil changes or lubrication, compressed air free of contaminants, ideal for workshops, garages, clinics and noise-sensitive laboratories. • Two independent outlets with individual pressure gauges: two pneumatic tools powered simultaneously with separately set pressures. • Enhanced safety: motor overload and overheating protection, built-in safety valve for intensive, prolonged use. • Optimal mobility: large 6-inch wheels for rolling over uneven surfaces, detachable handle with hose holder, a well-balanced 28 kg.

product.name: RURIS Luxury12 – Garden Hose Connector 1/2", Watertight Quick Coupling, Non-Slip
product.description:
The RURIS Luxury12 connector provides a fast, watertight connection for 1/2 inch garden hoses. It clips on in one move to attach a spray gun, lance or sprinkler to the garden hose, with no leaks and no tools. Its non-slip surface makes handling easy even with wet hands, and its sturdy construction makes it compatible with standard watering systems.
• Quick coupling: clips onto a 1/2 inch garden hose in one move to connect a spray gun, lance or sprinkler. • Reliable watertightness: leak-free connection for efficient watering and a constant water flow. • Secure grip: non-slip surface for easy connecting and disconnecting, even with wet hands. • Sturdy and compatible: durable construction, compatible with standard watering fittings and systems. • Tool-free installation: immediate setup, a lightweight (0.07 kg) and practical accessory for everyday use.

product.name: RURIS Luxury34 – Garden Hose Connector 3/4", Watertight Quick Coupling, High Flow Rates
product.description:
The RURIS Luxury34 connector provides a fast, watertight connection for 3/4 inch garden hoses. Designed for high flow rates, it clips onto the hose in one move to attach a spray gun, lance or tap, with no leaks and no tools. Its sturdy construction and non-slip surface guarantee a reliable connection, compatible with standard watering systems.
• Built for high flow rates: 3/4 inch format offering a greater water passage than 1/2 inch, ideal for large areas. • Quick coupling: clips onto the hose in one move to connect a spray gun, lance or tap, with tool-free fitting and removal. • Reinforced watertightness: reliable, leak-free connection, compatible with standard watering systems. • Ergonomic and durable: non-slip surface for a secure grip even with wet hands; sturdy construction for intensive use. • Box contents: Luxury34 connector for 3/4 inch garden hose.

product.name: RURIS Luxury12 – Aquastop Stop Connector for 1/2" Garden Hose, Automatic Water Shut-Off
product.description:
The RURIS Luxury12 stop connector for 1/2 inch garden hoses features an aquastop system that automatically cuts off the water as soon as the accessory is disconnected. No more splashing and no more waste: swap spray guns or lances without turning off the tap. Sturdy and watertight, it clips on in one move and remains compatible with standard watering systems.
• Automatic water shut-off: the aquastop system stops the water the moment the accessory is disconnected, with no splashing or waste. • Easy accessory changes: switch from spray gun to lance or sprinkler without going back to turn off the tap. • Standard 1/2 inch format: clips onto the garden hose in one move and remains compatible with standard fittings. • Sturdy and watertight: resistant construction with a non-slip surface for easy handling even with wet hands. • Box contents: Luxury12 aquastop stop connector for 1/2 inch hose.

product.name: RURIS Luxury34 – Aquastop Stop Connector for 3/4" Garden Hose, Automatic Water Shut-Off
product.description:
The RURIS Luxury34 stop connector for 3/4 inch garden hoses is fitted with an aquastop system that automatically cuts off the water when the accessory is disconnected. Ideal for high flow rates, it lets you swap spray guns or lances without turning off the tap and without splashing. Sturdy and watertight, it clips on in one move and suits standard watering systems.
• Automatic water shut-off: the aquastop stops the water as soon as the accessory is disconnected, with no splashing or waste. • High-flow 3/4 inch format: designed for large-diameter hoses, with a greater water passage than the 1/2 inch format. • Effortless accessory changes: replace the spray gun, lance or sprinkler without going back to turn off the tap. • Sturdy and watertight: resistant construction with a non-slip surface for safe handling and a reliable, leak-free connection. • Box contents: Luxury34 aquastop stop connector for 3/4 inch hose.

product.name: RURIS SmartYD 100M – Waterproof Garden Storage Box, Galvanised Steel, 300L, 80 kg Bench, Anthracite
product.description:
The RURIS SmartYD 100M storage box protects cushions, tools and garden accessories from moisture, dust and UV thanks to its waterproof galvanised steel. Its 300 L capacity, gas-strut lid that holds in 2 positions and cylinder lock with 2 keys keep your storage secure on the patio, in the garden or in the garage. Supporting 80 kg on the lid, it also doubles as a bench. Dimensions: 100 x 61 x 62 cm, anthracite grey.
• 300 L of waterproof storage: galvanised steel resistant to weather and UV, where plastic boxes fade and become brittle in the sun. • Versatile outdoors and indoors: stores outdoor cushions, garden tools, pool equipment and seasonal accessories away from moisture. • Gas-strut lid: assisted opening with 2 holding positions and a T-handle, cylinder lock supplied with 2 keys to secure the contents. • Doubles as a bench: structure supporting up to 80 kg on the lid, a handy extra seat on the patio, dimensions 100 x 61 x 62 cm. • Durable and easy to live with: discreet anthracite grey finish, simple assembly and easy maintenance for many years of outdoor use.

product.name: RURIS SmartYD 130M – Waterproof Garden Storage Box, Galvanised Steel, 400L, 80 kg Bench, Anthracite
product.description:
The RURIS SmartYD 130M storage box is the large version of the range: 400 L in waterproof galvanised steel to protect cushions, tools and equipment from moisture, dust and UV. Gas-strut lid that holds in 2 positions, T-handle and cylinder lock with 2 keys for secure storage in the garden, on the patio or in the garage. It supports 80 kg and also doubles as a bench. Dimensions: 130 x 61 x 62 cm, anthracite grey.
• 400 L of waterproof storage: large version in galvanised steel resistant to weather and UV, where plastic boxes warp in the sun. • Large family-sized capacity: stores outdoor cushions, garden tools, pool equipment and seasonal accessories, indoors or outdoors. • Gas-strut lid: assisted opening with 2 holding positions and a T-handle, cylinder lock supplied with 2 keys to secure the contents. • Doubles as a bench: structure supporting up to 80 kg on the lid, a handy extra seat, generous dimensions of 130 x 61 x 62 cm. • Durable and easy to live with: discreet anthracite grey finish, simple assembly and easy maintenance for long-lasting outdoor use.

product.name: RURIS 2524e – Brushless Cordless Chainsaw 20V 4Ah, 250 mm Bar, Lightweight 3.1 kg, Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS 2524e cordless chainsaw is a compact brushless model weighing 3.1 kg with a 250 mm bar and a maximum cutting capacity of 245 mm, designed for pruning fruit trees and cutting light firewood. Quiet and free of petrol-engine maintenance, it is perfectly suited to residential areas. ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery included, with bidirectional USB-C charging: no mains charger needed.
• Compact and efficient: 20V 4Ah (80 Wh) brushless motor and 250 mm bar for cutting branches, hardwood and logs up to 245 mm. • Ideal in the orchard and garden: pruning fruit trees and cutting light firewood, with no cable, fuel mix or exhaust fumes. • Automatic lubrication: generous 220 ml oil tank for continuous protection of the chain and bar. • Light and quiet: only 3.1 kg for optimal handling and use in residential areas without noise nuisance. • USB-C battery included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery rechargeable from any USB-C port and usable as a power bank.

product.name: RURIS 2624e – Battery Chainsaw 20V 4Ah, 300 mm Bar, Tool-Free SDS, USB-C Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS 2624e cordless chainsaw runs on a 20V 4Ah battery and offers a 300 mm bar with a maximum cutting capacity of 275 mm, ideal for garden maintenance, pruning and cutting light firewood. Tool-free SDS chain tensioning, safety brake and automatic lubrication (210 ml tank). ALFA UP 2400e X-Charge battery included, rechargeable via USB-C.
• Instant start: 20V electric motor at 3,600 rpm and a chain speed of 7 m/s for cutting branches, logs and small trunks without cable or fuel. • Easier garden maintenance: perfect for pruning, trimming fruit trees and cutting light firewood around the house. • Tool-free SDS tensioning: chain adjustable in seconds right at the worksite, automatic lubrication with a 210 ml oil tank. • Safe operation: mechanical chain brake with emergency stop and unlock button for constant control. • Battery included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah X-Charge Li-Ion battery with USB-C charging, also usable as a power bank for your mobile devices.

product.name: RURIS 2744e – Brushless Chainsaw 2x20V (40V), 400 mm Bar, 25 m/s, 2 x 4Ah Batteries Included
product.description:
The RURIS 2744e cordless chainsaw is driven by a brushless motor powered by 2 x 20V 4Ah batteries (40V, 160 Wh): 400 mm bar, maximum cutting capacity of 395 mm and a chain speed of 25 m/s for firewood and demanding pruning. Two speeds, tool-free SDS tensioning, double brake and low vibrations. The 2 included ALFA UP 2400e X-Charge batteries recharge via USB-C.
• 40V power: brushless motor at 13,500 rpm powered by 2 x 20V 4Ah batteries for a 25 m/s chain speed and fast cuts up to 395 mm. • 2 speeds with variable trigger: match the power to thin branches or hardwood and optimise working runtime. • Tool-free SDS tensioning: chain adjustment and replacement without a wrench or screwdriver, automatic lubrication with a 180 ml tank. • Comfort and safety: double chain brake, reduced vibrations (1.76 m/s²) and a controlled weight of 5 kg for prolonged work without fatigue. • 2 batteries included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah X-Charge Li-Ion batteries with USB-C charging, also usable as a power bank.

product.name: RURIS 2844e – Lightweight 3.8 kg Brushless Chainsaw 2x20V (40V), 300 mm Bar, 2 Batteries Included
product.description:
At just 3.8 kg, the RURIS 2844e cordless chainsaw is one of the lightest in its 40V class: a brushless motor powered by 2 x 20V 4Ah batteries, a 300 mm bar and a maximum cutting capacity of 285 mm for pruning and trimming trees, even at height. Tool-free SDS tensioning, double chain brake and automatic lubrication. 2 ALFA UP 2400e X-Charge batteries included, with USB-C charging.
• Record-breaking lightness: only 3.8 kg for a 2x20V (40V, 160 Wh) brushless motor, ideal for cutting branches and small trunks with total control. • Effortless pruning: perfect for fruit trees, thick hedges and high branches, with push-button start and quiet operation. • Tool-free SDS tensioning: chain adjustment in seconds, automatic lubrication with a 150 ml oil tank, chain speed of 6.7 m/s. • Enhanced safety: double chain brake and a brushless motor delivering stable torque at full load, without overheating. • 2 batteries included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah X-Charge Li-Ion batteries with USB-C charging, also usable as a power bank.

product.name: RURIS VoltX 4564e – 60V Cordless Chainsaw, 450 mm Bar, 25 m/s, Battery and Charger Included
product.description:
The RURIS VoltX 4564e cordless chainsaw combines a 60V brushless motor with a 450 mm bar and a chain speed of 25 m/s to cut firewood, medium-sized trunks and thick branches. Tool-free SDS tensioning, dual chain brake and LED lighting for safe, precise work. Supplied with the ALFA UP 6400e 60V 4Ah battery and charger included.
• High cutting power: 60V brushless motor at 13,800 rpm, 450 mm bar and 25 m/s chain speed to cut through trunks up to 390 mm in a single pass. • Versatile for everyday use: ideal for firewood, pruning and felling small trees, with no fuel mixing and no cable. • Tool-free SDS adjustment: chain tensioning in seconds, automatic lubrication with a 240 ml oil tank and LED work light. • Safety and comfort: dual chain brake, metal bucking spikes, Soft Grip handle and a contained weight of 4 kg for total control. • Battery and charger included: RURIS ALFA UP 6400e 60V 4Ah Li-Ion battery with digital display, compatible with the entire VoltX range.

product.name: RURIS 1424e – 20V Cordless Telescopic Pole Pruner, 1.29-1.70 m, 100 mm Cut, 4Ah Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS 1424e cordless telescopic pole pruner lets you trim high branches from the ground thanks to its arm adjustable from 1.29 m to 1.70 m, with no ladder needed. Its 7-position pivoting head adapts to the orientation of the branches and cuts up to 100 mm, ideal for fruit and ornamental trees. Lightweight (2.5 kg), it comes with the ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with USB-C charging.
• Prune at height without a ladder: telescopic arm adjustable from 1.29 m to 1.70 m to safely reach high branches from the ground. • Versatile in the orchard: ideal for maintaining fruit trees, ornamental trees and tall hedges, cutting branches up to 100 mm. • 7-position pivoting head: adjustable cutting angle to match the orientation of the branches, with automatic chain lubrication. • Light and easy to handle: around 2.5 kg with an ergonomic multi-point handle to reduce fatigue during extended work. • USB-C battery included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery rechargeable from any USB-C port, also usable as a power bank.

product.name: RURIS RMX3140 – 20V Cordless Circular Saw, 140 mm Blade, 50 mm Cutting Depth, 0-45°, Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX3140 cordless circular saw with a 20V brushless motor spins at 6800 rpm with a 140 mm blade to cut wood, MDF, OSB and certain plastics. Cutting depth adjustable up to 50 mm and angle adjustable from 0 to 45° for bevel cuts. Lightweight (1.8 kg), with LED light and graduated base plate. Battery and charger included: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with USB-C charging and cable.
• 6800 rpm brushless motor: 140 mm blade for clean, fast cuts in wood, MDF, OSB and certain plastics, with no cord or power outlet. • Ideal for DIY and home improvement: cuts boards, skirting, panels and battens, even at height or in tight spaces thanks to its 1.8 kg weight. • Precise, adjustable cuts: depth up to 50 mm, angle adjustable from 0 to 45°, graduated base plate and width limiter for straight and bevel cuts. • Comfort and visibility: LED lighting for poorly lit areas and a lightweight grip for long working sessions without fatigue. • Battery and charger included: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C port and cable; 140 mm blade fitted; the battery also powers your other RURIS 20V tools.

product.name: RURIS RMX3260 – 20V Brushless Cordless Jigsaw, 3800 rpm, 20V 4Ah USB-C Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX3260 cordless jigsaw with a brushless motor cuts wood, metal, plastic and aluminium with precision: 3800 rpm, 26 mm stroke, 5 speeds plus automatic mode, 4 pendulum positions and an angle adjustable to ±45°. Easy Lock system and LED lighting. Supplied with the RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C charging (cable included, no mains charger) and 4 blades.
• Fast, clean cuts: brushless motor at 3800 rpm with a 26 mm blade stroke to cut wood, metal, plastic and aluminium with precision. • 20V 4Ah battery included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e battery with bidirectional USB-C charging, rechargeable from any USB-C port and usable as a power bank for your mobile devices. • Complete adjustments: 5 speeds plus automatic mode, 4 pendulum positions and cutting angle adjustable to ±22.5° and ±45° to suit every material. • Cutting line always visible: automatic dust blowing, LED lighting and Easy Lock system to change blades in seconds without tools. • Box contents: RMX3260 jigsaw, 20V 4Ah USB-C battery with cable, 4 blades (100 x 1.5 x 45 mm), vacuum connector, cutting limiter.

product.name: RURIS RMX370 – 20V Brushless Cordless Electric Pruning Shears, Ø 37 mm Cut, without Battery or Charger
product.description:
The RURIS RMX370 cordless electric pruning shears trim fruit trees, vines and shrubs effortlessly. Their 840 W brushless motor cuts branches up to 37 mm in diameter in 0.4 seconds, with quiet, long-lasting operation. Light and easy to handle, they come with a carrying case, Allen key, flat spanner and oil bottle. Sold without battery or charger, compatible with RURIS 20V batteries.
• Powerful cutting: 840 W brushless motor slicing through branches up to 37 mm in diameter, even in hardwoods. • Fast and clean: 0.4-second cutting time per branch to prune fruit trees, vines and shrubs without fatigue. • Maintenance-free brushless motor: low wear, quiet operation and extended service life, season after season. • Light and ergonomic: around 1.6 kg, easy to handle and carry in its rugged case to work across the whole plot. • Sold without battery or charger: supplied with case, Allen key, flat spanner and lubricating oil bottle; works with RURIS 20V batteries.

product.name: RURIS 1215 – 15 m 1/2" Porous Soaker Hose, Drip Irrigation, 4-6 L/min Flow, UV-Resistant
product.description:
The RURIS 1215 porous soaker hose releases water slowly and evenly along its 15 metres, directly at root level, for deep hydration of flower beds, vegetable gardens and shrubs. It saves up to 70% water compared with conventional watering, with an adjustable flow of 4 to 6 L/min. Made of UV-resistant rubber certified food-safe, it can be laid on the surface or buried up to 20 cm. Supplied with connectors and a tap adapter.
• Efficient irrigation: slow, even water distribution at the base of plants over 15 m, for deep root hydration without wetting the foliage. • Up to 70% water savings: the porous rubber structure greatly reduces evaporation compared with conventional watering, with an adjustable flow of 4 to 6 L/min. • Standard 1/2 inch format: 12.4 mm inner and 17 mm outer diameter, compatible with most irrigation systems; lay on the surface or bury up to 20 cm. • Durable and safe: rubber with a 2.3 mm wall and UV protection, certified food-safe, ideal for vegetable gardens and aromatic herbs. • Box contents: 15 m porous hose, connector with control valve and tap adapter, and connector with stop plug.

product.name: RURIS Hybrid1220 – 30 m Garden Hose, 1/2 Inch, 3-Layer Polyfusion, 35 Bar, Anti-Twist
product.description:
The 30 m RURIS Hybrid1220 garden hose is made using 3-layer Polyfusion technology, for pressure resistance up to 35 bar. Compatible with 1/2 inch fittings, it features UV protection and an anti-twist system that prevents kinks while watering. A durable choice for daily watering of lawns, flower beds and vegetable gardens.
• High-pressure resistant: 3-layer Polyfusion construction withstanding up to 35 bar, for a garden hose that lasts even under intensive use. • 30 m length in 1/2 inch format: covers the whole garden and connects to standard 1/2" connectors, spray guns and sprinklers. • Anti-twist system: the hose does not kink or tangle, for a constant water flow while watering. • UV protection: material treated against sunlight, keeping its flexibility and strength season after season. • Box contents: 30 m Hybrid1220 garden hose, ready to fit your watering system.

product.name: RURIS Hybrid1230 – 30 m 1/2" Garden Hose, 3-Layer Polyfusion, 35 Bar, Anti-Twist, UV-Resistant
product.description:
The 30-metre RURIS Hybrid1230 garden hose combines a 3-layer hybrid polymer with a polyester reinforcement thanks to Polyfusion technology. Flexible, anti-twist and anti-knot, it unrolls easily even in tight spaces. It withstands 35 bar of pressure, UV rays, algae and temperatures from -10 to +60 °C, and is certified food-safe. Supplied with 2 quick connectors and a tap adapter.
• Polyfusion technology: 3 layers of hybrid polymer bonded with polyester reinforcement for a flexible, anti-twist, anti-knot hose. • Highly resistant: 35 bar burst pressure, 2.7 mm wall and operating range from -10 to +60 °C to last season after season. • 30 m format in 1/2 inch: 12 mm inner and 17.4 mm outer diameter, compatible with most taps, fittings and watering accessories. • Safe and durable: UV protection, algae resistance and food-safe certification, suitable for vegetable gardens and aromatic herbs. • Box contents: 30 m hose, 2 quick connectors and 1 tap adapter for immediate, tool-free installation.

product.name: RURIS NTS1220-5 – 20 m 1/2" Garden Hose, 5-Layer Anti-Twist NTS, UV-Resistant
product.description:
The 20-metre RURIS NTS1220-5 garden hose ensures steady, convenient watering of the garden. Its 5-layer structure with NTS (No Torsion System) anti-twist technology prevents twists and knots for a constant water flow, even around flower beds and through narrow passages. UV-resistant and compatible with standard 1/2 inch fittings, it is a lasting companion for watering both the lawn and the vegetable garden.
• NTS anti-twist: the No Torsion System prevents twists and knots for a constant water flow along the entire length of the hose. • Practical length: 20 metres in the standard 1/2 inch format, suited to small and medium-sized gardens. • 5-layer structure: reinforced construction offering good resistance to pressure and everyday wear. • UV-resistant: designed for outdoor use, it stays flexible and durable season after season. • Compatible: connects to standard 1/2 inch taps, quick connectors and watering accessories.

product.name: RURIS NTS1230-5 – 30 m 1/2" Garden Hose, 5-Layer Anti-Twist NTS, 30 Bar, 2 Connectors Included
product.description:
The 30-metre RURIS NTS1230-5 garden hose ensures steady, comfortable watering of the garden. Its NTS (No Torsion System) technology prevents twists and knots for a constant flow, even in gardens with complex layouts. Its polyester-reinforced 5-layer structure, resistant to UV and to 30 bar of pressure, guarantees a long service life. Supplied with 2 quick connectors and a tap adapter.
• NTS anti-twist: the No Torsion System prevents twists and knots for a constant water flow along the entire length. • Wide coverage: 30 metres of hose in the standard 1/2 inch format, compatible with most watering fittings and accessories. • 5-layer structure: polyester-reinforced and resistant to pressures up to 30 bar for excellent longevity. • UV-resistant: designed for outdoor use, it stays flexible and durable season after season. • Box contents: 30 m hose, 2 quick connectors and a tap adapter for immediate setup.

product.name: RURIS 1215PC – 15 m 1/2" Flat Textile Soaker Hose, Oxford 210D, 9-10 L/min, Connectors Included
product.description:
The RURIS 1215PC flat textile soaker hose distributes water evenly along its 15 metres, directly at the plants' roots, and saves up to 80% water compared with conventional watering. Made of Oxford 210D fabric with PVC, PP and ABS, it delivers 9 to 10 L/min at 4 bar and connects to 1/2 inch systems. Flat, light (0.708 kg) and easy to store, it comes with one connector and one connector with water stop.
• Root-level irrigation: flat, porous design distributing water evenly over 15 m, with up to 80% water savings compared with conventional watering. • Rugged textile: Oxford 210D fabric combined with PVC, PP and ABS to withstand wear and outdoor conditions all season long. • Steady flow: 9 to 10 L/min at 4 bar of pressure, compatible with standard 1/2 inch watering systems; operating temperature from 5 to 35 °C. • Compact and light: flat 0.708 kg format that folds and stores without taking up space, ideal for small and medium-sized gardens. • Box contents: 15 m flat soaker hose, 1/2 inch connector and 1/2 inch connector with water stop for tool-free assembly.

product.name: RURIS R-Power IS2000 – 2000 W Petrol Inverter Generator, Quiet, THD < 3%, 4 L Tank
product.description:
The RURIS R-Power IS2000 inverter generator is a portable, quiet and reliable power source to run your appliances during power outages, while camping or outdoors. Its 3 HP 4-stroke engine delivers 2000 W through a 230 V socket, with low distortion (THD < 3%) that protects sensitive electronics. 4 L tank for up to 5.7 hours of runtime at 50% load.
• 2000 W of power: 3 HP 4-stroke engine sufficient to run lighting, TV, computer, booster pump and other appliances via a 230 V socket. • Quiet inverter technology: discreet operation, ideal for camping, urban areas or extended power outages. • Clean, stable power: automatic voltage regulator and low harmonic distortion (THD < 3%) to protect your sensitive electronic devices. • Long runtime: up to 5.7 hours of operation at 50% load thanks to the 4 L fuel tank. • Portable and practical: compact 19.8 kg format, easy to move around as a backup power source at home or outdoors.

product.name: RURIS AquaPower 1008S – 750W Booster Pump, 19L Tank, 46 L/min Flow, 45 m Head, Pressure Gauge
product.description:
The RURIS AquaPower 1008S booster pump (750W) automatically supplies the house and garden with water from a well, cistern or rainwater tank. With its 46 L/min flow rate, 45 m delivery head and 19 L anti-corrosion tank, it ensures constant pressure for sanitary fittings, washing machines and watering. Cast-iron pump body and bronze impeller for a long service life.
• Efficient pumping: 750 W motor delivering a 46 L/min flow rate, a 45 m delivery head and suction down to 9 m for a reliable water supply. • Versatile uses: supplies toilets, washbasins, washing machines, watering or cleaning systems, using well or rainwater to save drinking water. • 19 L anti-corrosion tank: the stored pressure reduces pump start-ups, for optimised power consumption and less motor wear. • Durable construction: cast-iron pump body and bronze impeller for maximum resistance and a long service life, even in regular use. • Easy installation: convenient side switch, wide filling opening, built-in pressure gauge and perforated feet for stable floor mounting.

product.name: RURIS AquaPower 2010S – 900W Booster Pump, 24L Tank, 52 L/min Flow, 50 m Head, Pressure Gauge
product.description:
The RURIS AquaPower 2010S booster pump (900W) automatically distributes water throughout the house and garden from a well or a rainwater collection tank. Its 52 L/min flow rate, 50 m delivery head and 24 L anti-corrosion tank guarantee constant pressure for sanitary fittings, washing machines and watering. Cast-iron body, stainless steel impeller and flexible hose included.
• Powerful, automatic pumping: 900 W motor, 52 L/min flow rate and delivery head up to 50 m to distribute water efficiently throughout the house. • Versatile uses: ideal for washbasins, toilets, washing machines, watering and cleaning systems, with suction down to 9 m from wells or cisterns. • 24 L anti-corrosion tank: the stored pressure limits frequent pump restarts, for constant pressure and reduced power consumption. • Robust design: cast-iron pump body, stainless steel impeller and stable feet with mounting holes for a durable, vibration-free installation. • Economical and eco-friendly: makes use of rainwater or well water to cut drinking water consumption and household costs; flexible hose included.

product.name: RURIS AquaPower 2011S – 1100W Booster Pump, 50 L Tank, 58 L/min Flow, 55 m Head
product.description:
The RURIS AquaPower 2011S booster pump (1100W) provides an automatic, constant water supply for the whole house, even under intensive use. It delivers a 58 L/min flow rate, a 55 m delivery head, suction down to 9 m and a large 50 L anti-corrosion tank that limits pump restarts. Ideal for using well or rainwater for sanitary fittings, watering and cleaning.
• High performance: 1100 W motor, 58 L/min flow rate, suction down to 9 m and a 55 m delivery head for reliable, intensive household use. • Large 50 L tank: anti-corrosion vessel that stores pressure and prevents frequent pump restarts, for greater comfort and longevity. • Versatile uses: supplies sanitary fittings and the washing machine, waters the garden, cleans the terrace or washes vehicles from a well or cistern. • Economical and eco-friendly: allows the use of rainwater or well water, reducing drinking water consumption and household energy costs. • Easy installation and maintenance: sturdy cast-iron pump, built-in pressure gauge, side switch, feet with mounting holes and easy draining for winter storage.

product.name: RURIS Smart Light High Pressure 62 – 1150W Booster Pump, 62 L/min, 50 m Head, Digital Display
product.description:
The RURIS Smart Light High Pressure 62 booster pump (1150W) delivers a flow rate of 62 L/min and a delivery head of 50 m, supplying several water points at once without any drop in pressure. Its suction depth of up to 9 m makes it suitable for wells, cisterns and tanks. Rust-proof cast iron body, bronze impeller, digital display, automatic start/stop and dry-run and overload protections.
• Flow rate of 62 L/min and 50 m delivery head: simultaneously supplies the bathroom, kitchen, washing machine and garden watering without pressure loss, even across several floors. • Suction up to 9 m: efficiently draws water from wells, cisterns, tanks or low-pressure networks, for maximum compatibility with your installation. • Premium construction: rust-treated cast iron body, bronze impeller and copper winding on the 1150 W motor for lasting performance under intensive use. • Smart functions and safety: digital monitoring display, Start-Up Delay, dry-run protection and overload protection for safe everyday operation. • Automatic and manual start/stop: the pump activates according to actual water demand, avoiding unnecessary running and reducing power consumption.

product.name: RURIS Smart Magnetic High Pressure 90 – 1150W Inverter Booster Pump, 90 L/min, 50 m, Digital Display
product.description:
The RURIS Smart Magnetic High Pressure 90 booster pump (1150W) delivers a flow rate of 90 L/min and a delivery head of 50 m for demanding household use. Its permanent-magnet inverter adjusts motor speed to actual water demand, saving energy and running quietly. Digital display with pressure adjustment and timer, rust-proof cast iron body, IPX4 protection. Weight: 6.5 kg.
• Flow rate of 90 L/min and 50 m delivery head: simultaneously supplies the bathroom, kitchen, washing machine and garden watering without pressure loss, even across several floors. • Permanent-magnet inverter: motor speed (up to 5600 rpm) adapts to water demand, reducing power consumption, noise and water hammer. • Digital display and smart functions: pressure adjustment, programmable timer, consumption tracking and error indicator for quick diagnostics. • Durable construction: rust-treated cast iron body, PPO impeller, copper winding and IPX4 protection for safe use in damp environments. • Suction up to 8 m: draws from wells, cisterns and tanks; max water temperature 50 °C, 2 m power cable and 6.5 kg weight for easy installation.

product.name: RURIS 64e Fast Charger VoltX 60V 4A 260W for ALFA UP 6400e and 6800e Batteries, LED Diagnostics
product.description:
The RURIS 64e is the fast charger dedicated to the VoltX 60V platform: with 4A output current and 260W, it recharges the ALFA UP 6400e (4Ah) and 6800e (8Ah) batteries considerably faster than a standard 2A charger. Its intelligent temperature management delays charging if the battery is too hot, and the red/green LED panel shows the charge status at a glance. Not compatible with RURIS 20V batteries.
• Fast 4A 260W charging: recharges VoltX 60V batteries up to twice as fast as a standard 2A charger, reducing waiting time between work sessions. • One charger for the whole VoltX fleet: compatible with the ALFA UP 6400e (60V 4Ah) and 6800e (60V 8Ah) batteries used on brush cutters, chainsaws, hedge trimmers and blowers. • Intelligent temperature management: charging is automatically delayed if the battery is too hot after use, preserving the cells over the long term. • Built-in safety: overload and short-circuit protections, double insulation and rail-mounted insertion with no adjustment needed, for worry-free unattended charging. • Box contents: 1 RURIS 64e VoltX 60V charger with red/green LED diagnostic panel and 230 V mains cable. Not compatible with RURIS 20V batteries.

product.name: RURIS 30024e – 300 W Portable Power Station with 4 x 20V 4Ah Batteries Included, AC 240V, USB-C
product.description:
The RURIS 30024e is a 300 W portable inverter supplied with 4 ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries included (320 Wh in total) and automatic switching between batteries with no interruption. Plugged into the mains, it recharges all 4 batteries simultaneously. AC 240V, USB-C 18W, 2x USB-A and DC 12V/5A outputs, plus a 7.2 W LED lamp: a complete mobile power solution for camping, the garden and power outages.
• Ready-to-use 300 W power station: 4 RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries included (320 Wh) with automatic switching from one battery to the next without interruption. • Inverter and quadruple charger in one: plugged into the mains, it recharges all 4 batteries simultaneously; the batteries also power all RURIS 20V tools. • Mobile power strip: AC 210-240V, USB-C 18W fast charging, 2x USB-A 5V/2A and DC 12V/5A outputs to power several devices at once. • Safe and practical: overcurrent, short-circuit and overheating protections; built-in 7.2 W LED lamp for emergency lighting during power cuts. • Box contents: 30024e inverter, 4 ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries with LED display and bidirectional USB-C port, 4 USB-C cables and mains adapter.

product.name: RURIS 5815 – Misting Kit for Terrace and Pergola, Fine Water Droplets, No Electricity Needed
product.description:
The RURIS 5815 misting kit cools terraces, pergolas and verandas by spraying fine water droplets that lower the perceived temperature on hot days. It attaches along a structure, connects to the garden hose and runs on mains water pressure, with no electricity required. Ideal for dining areas, restaurant terraces and outdoor relaxation spaces.
• Effective cooling: sprays fine water droplets that lower the perceived temperature on the terrace during hot summer days. • Versatile: suitable for terraces, pergolas, verandas and dining areas, creating a pleasant outdoor space all summer long. • Works without electricity: simply uses mains water pressure via the garden hose, with nozzles ensuring an even spray. • Easy installation: attaches along a pergola or awning and connects to the garden hose, with quick tool-free assembly. • Light and discreet: compact set of around 0.87 kg, easy to install at the start of the season and to store away afterwards.

product.name: RURIS RMX1390 – Cordless Brushless Drill Driver 130 Nm, 2 Speeds, 20V 4Ah Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX1390 cordless drill driver with brushless motor delivers 130 Nm of torque with 2 mechanical speeds (0-300 and 0-1200 rpm) to drill wood up to 150 mm and metal up to 13 mm. 3-16 mm chuck, LED light and 3-position handle. Supplied with the RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with USB-C charging (cable included, no mains charger), an 80x300 mm earth auger bit and 9 wood/metal drill bits.
• High 130 Nm torque: brushless motor and 2 mechanical speeds (0-300 and 0-1200 rpm) to drill wood up to 150 mm and metal up to 13 mm. • 20V 4Ah battery included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e battery with bidirectional USB-C charging, rechargeable from any USB-C port and usable as a power bank for your mobile devices. • Versatile 3-16 mm chuck: compatible with a wide range of drill bits, with a 3-position D-handle and 150 mm extension for safe guidance. • Ideal for heavy jobs: pilot holes in beams, fence posts and planting supports thanks to the included 80x300 mm earth auger bit, with LED lighting. • Box contents: RMX1390 drill, 20V 4Ah USB-C battery with cable, 80x300 mm earth auger bit, 5 metal drill bits, 4 wood drill bits, chuck key, adapter, D-handle.

product.name: RURIS RMX1360 – Cordless Brushless Hammer Drill Driver 60 Nm, Battery and Charger Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX1360 cordless hammer drill driver combines a brushless motor, 2 speeds (0-450 and 0-2000 rpm), 60 Nm of torque and a hammer action of 30,000 blows/min to drill wood, metal, concrete and masonry. 0-13 mm keyless chuck and LED lighting. 20V 2Ah battery and charger included, along with 5 screwdriver bits and 7 drill bits (3-10 mm) so you can start right away.
• Long-lasting brushless motor: constant power and extended service life for drilling and driving in wood, metal and masonry. • 2 selectable speeds: 0-450 rpm for high torque and precise screwdriving, 0-2000 rpm for fast, efficient drilling. • 30,000 blows/min hammer action: penetrates concrete and masonry with no extra effort, with a 0-13 mm keyless chuck and 60 Nm of torque. • Built-in LED: optimal visibility in dark corners so you can work precisely in any situation. • Battery and charger included: supplied with a 20V 2Ah lithium battery, charger, 5 screwdriver bits and 7 drill bits (3-10 mm), ready to use.

product.name: RURIS RMX1260 – Cordless Brushless Drill Driver 60 Nm, 2 Speeds, Battery and Charger Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX1260 cordless drill driver relies on a brushless motor, 2 speeds (0-450 and 0-2000 rpm) and 60 Nm of torque to drill and drive in wood, metal and plastic. 0-10 mm keyless chuck, built-in LED and charge indicator. 20V 2Ah battery and charger included, with 5 screwdriver bits and 7 drill bits (3-10 mm) so you can work straight out of the box.
• Efficient brushless motor: greater efficiency, reduced wear and constant power for all your drilling and screwdriving jobs. • 2 versatile speeds: 0-450 rpm for high torque and controlled screwdriving, 0-2000 rpm for fast drilling in soft materials. • 60 Nm torque and 0-10 mm chuck: great flexibility for driving and drilling with a wide range of drill bits and screwdriver bits. • User comfort: built-in LED for dark areas and battery level indicator to keep track of remaining runtime. • Battery and charger included: supplied with a 20V 2Ah lithium battery, charger, 5 screwdriver bits and 7 drill bits (3-10 mm), ready to use.

product.name: RURIS RMX1240 – Cordless Brushless Drill Driver 20V, 21 Torque Settings, Battery and Charger Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX1240 cordless drill driver is light (0.94 kg) and versatile: 20V brushless motor, 2 speeds (0-400 and 0-1350 rpm), 21 torque settings and a 0-10 mm chuck. It drills up to 25 mm in wood and 10 mm in metal, with built-in LED lighting. 20V 2Ah battery and charger included, plus 8 bits, 8 drill bits (2-6 mm), magnetic adapter and countersink bit.
• 20V brushless motor: high energy efficiency, constant power and reduced maintenance for a long service life. • 2 speeds and 21 torque settings: 0-400 rpm for precise screwdriving, 0-1350 rpm for fast drilling, without damaging screws or materials. • Versatile capacities: 0-10 mm chuck, drilling up to 25 mm in wood and 10 mm in metal, driving screws up to 10 mm in diameter. • Light and precise: only 0.94 kg with built-in LED lighting, comfortable even in awkward positions or during long work sessions. • Battery and charger included: complete kit with 20V 2Ah battery, 8 bits, 8 drill bits (2-6 mm), magnetic adapter and countersink bit, ready to use.

product.name: RURIS RMX2300 – Cordless Impact Driver 20V 230 Nm, 3300 rpm, 1/4" Hex, 4Ah Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX2300 cordless impact driver with brushless motor delivers 230 Nm, 3300 rpm and 4500 blows/min to drive and remove M8 to M18 screws effortlessly. Ultra-compact (0.94 kg), it suits tradespeople, electricians and carpenters. Battery and charger included: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C charging and cable, ready to use straight out of the box.
• 230 Nm torque and brushless motor: 3300 rpm and 4500 blows/min to drive bolts and long M8-M18 screws where a standard drill driver stalls. • Ideal for assembly, construction and mechanics: ultra-compact 0.94 kg format for reaching tight spaces and handling repetitive screwdriving. • 1/4 inch (6.35 mm) hex socket: quick bit changes; torque adjustable in 3 stages and Reversal Stop function to avoid damaging screws and soft materials. • Comfort and control: LED lighting, battery level indicator and balanced grip for precise work even in dark areas. • Battery and charger included: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C port and cable; recharges from any USB-C port and also powers your other RURIS 20V tools.

product.name: RURIS RMX3500 – Cordless Impact Wrench 20V 350 Nm, 1/2" Square Drive, 3300 bpm, 4Ah Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX3500 cordless impact wrench with brushless motor develops an extreme torque of 350 Nm, 2400 rpm and 3300 blows/min for heavy bolting: car wheels, rusted nuts, M8-M18 fasteners. Its 1/2 inch square drive accepts standard impact sockets. Battery and charger included: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C charging and cable.
• Extreme 350 Nm torque: brushless motor at 2400 rpm and 3300 blows/min to tighten and loosen large bolts up to M18 effortlessly. • Ideal for automotive mechanics and construction: removes wheels, rusted nuts and seized fasteners, for garage mechanics and building professionals. • 1/2 inch square drive: compatible with standard impact sockets; torque adjustable in 3 stages and Reversal Stop function for precise tightening control. • Compact and comfortable: only 1 kg, with LED lighting and battery level indicator for efficient work anywhere. • Battery and charger included: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C port and cable; recharges from any USB-C port and also powers your other RURIS 20V tools.

product.name: RURIS DAC 110XR – Self-Propelled Petrol Lawn Mower 3.3 HP 131 cc, 41 cm Cutting Width, 45 L Bag, up to 400 m²
product.description:
The DAC 110XR self-propelled petrol lawn mower is fitted with a 131 cc Ducar 4-stroke engine (3.3 HP) with electronic ignition. Its 41 cm cutting width and 45 L grass collection bag make it the ideal solution for residential gardens of 200 to 400 m². The all-metal deck ensures durability, the cutting height adjusts from 25 to 75 mm across 7 positions, and rear discharge complements the collection function. Fuel consumption: 0.7 L/h.
• Proven Ducar engine: 131 cc 4-stroke engine developing 3.3 HP, with electronic ignition and moderate fuel consumption of 0.7 L/h. • Effortless self-propulsion: the self-drive system reduces fatigue and makes regular mowing of residential gardens of 200 to 400 m² easier. • All-metal deck: fully metal construction that is far more resistant to impacts and wear than the plastic decks in the same segment. • Precisely adjustable cutting: height from 25 to 75 mm across 7 positions, 41 cm cutting width, with collection and rear discharge functions to choose from. • Everyday comfort: 45 L collection bag to space out emptying, 7-inch front wheels and 8-inch rear wheels for good stability.

product.name: RURIS DAC 120XR – Self-Propelled Petrol Lawn Mower 4 HP 150 cc, 46 cm, 5 Functions with Mulching, 55 L Bag
product.description:
The DAC 120XR self-propelled petrol lawn mower features a 150 cc Ducar 4-stroke engine (4 HP) with a throttle variator to match power to grass density. Its 46 cm cutting width and 55 L bag suit gardens of 300 to 600 m². It offers 5 functions: collection, rear discharge, side discharge, mulching and deck washing. Metal deck, cutting height adjustable from 25 to 75 mm across 8 positions.
• Ducar engine with variator: 150 cc 4-stroke (4 HP) with a throttle variator to adjust power to the grass and save fuel (0.8 L/h). • 5 versatile functions: collection in the 55 L bag, rear discharge, side discharge, fertilising mulching and deck-wash function via water connector. • Self-propelled for medium to large areas: self-drive and the 46 cm width reduce effort and the number of passes over 300 to 600 m². • Fine cutting adjustment: height adjustable from 25 to 75 mm across 8 positions, to suit the season and keep the lawn healthy. • Durable construction: tough metal deck, 7-inch front wheels and 8-inch rear wheels for stable mowing on uneven ground.

product.name: RURIS RXE1200 – Electric Lawn Mower 1200 W, 32 cm Cutting Width, 3 Heights 25-60 mm, 30 L Bag
product.description:
The RURIS RXE1200 electric lawn mower keeps residential lawns in shape reliably. Its 1200 W motor running at 3100 rpm and 32 cm cutting width deliver a clean cut, even in dense grass. Three cutting heights (25, 45 and 60 mm) adapt to every season, while the 30 L grass collection bag reduces interruptions. Its folding handle makes storage and transport easy.
• 1200 W motor: runs at 3100 rpm to tackle the dense grass of residential gardens, with consistent performance and instant start-up. • Clean, quiet mowing: mains-powered, it runs without fuel, emissions or a pull cord, and requires no engine maintenance. • Cutting height adjustable to 3 levels: 25, 45 or 60 mm to match the mowing to the season and your preferences, over a 32 cm working width. • 30 L collection bag: generous capacity that reduces trips to empty the grass and allows continuous, tidy work. • Compact and light: folding handle and a weight of around 9.4 kg for easy storage and effortless transport, ideal for small gardens.

product.name: RURIS RXE1400 Confort – Electric Lawn Mower 1400 W, 34 cm Cutting Width, 6 Heights 20-70 mm, 35 L Bag
product.description:
The RURIS RXE1400 Confort electric lawn mower cares for residential lawns with precision. Its 1400 W motor at 3500 rpm cuts over a 34 cm width, with 6 heights from 20 to 70 mm set via a single central adjustment. Its grass comb lifts flattened blades before cutting for a uniform finish, and its 35 L bag with fill-level indicator reduces stops. Adjustable and foldable Confort Pro handle.
• 1400 W motor at 3500 rpm: constant power for a clean, even cut on residential lawns, with instant start-up on 230 V mains. • 6 cutting heights from 20 to 70 mm: a single central adjustment sets all 4 wheels in one movement, with a visual indicator of the selected level. • Grass-lifting comb: positioned in front of the blade, it raises flattened blades before cutting for an even result, even on uneven lawns. • Confort Pro handle: ergonomic, height-adjustable to suit the user and foldable for compact storage in the garage or shed. • 35 L collection bag: fill-level indicator so you empty it at the right time, with optional rear discharge to leave clippings on the ground; only 9 kg.

product.name: RURIS RXE1500 – Electric Lawn Mower 1500 W, 37 cm Cutting Width, 25-75 mm Cutting Height, 35 L Grass Box
product.description:
The RURIS RXE1500 electric lawn mower combines power and comfort for maintaining residential lawns. Its 1500 W motor running at 3300 rpm cuts thick grass efficiently over a 37 cm width, with a cutting height adjustable from 25 to 75 mm. The 35 L grass collection box reduces interruptions, and the foldable handle makes storage easy, even in tight spaces.
• 1500 W motor: runs at 3300 rpm to cut thick grass and handle uneven terrain, with instant start-up and no pull cord. • 37 cm cutting width: covers medium-sized lawns quickly, for efficient mowing of urban and residential gardens. • Adjustable cutting height from 25 to 75 mm: three levels to adapt mowing to the season, grass type and your maintenance preferences. • Quiet and clean: 230 V mains power, no fuel, no emissions and no engine maintenance, considerate to your neighbours. • 35 L grass box and foldable handle: large collection capacity that reduces stops, plus compact storage made easy for the garage or garden shed.

product.name: RURIS RXE1800 Confort – Electric Lawn Mower 1800 W, 40 cm Cutting Width, 3-in-1 Mulching, 40 L Grass Box
product.description:
The RURIS RXE1800 Confort electric lawn mower tackles even the densest lawns. Its 1800 W motor running at 3500 rpm cuts across a 40 cm width, with 7 cutting heights from 25 to 75 mm set via central adjustment. Choose from three functions: collection in the 40 L box, rear discharge or fertilising mulching. The foam Confort Pro handle is adjustable and foldable, and vertical storage keeps the footprint to a minimum.
• 1800 W motor at 3500 rpm: mows even thick, dense lawns efficiently without losing power, over a 40 cm cutting width. • 3 functions in 1: collection in the box, rear discharge, or mulching that finely chops the grass and returns it to the lawn as natural fertiliser. • 7 cutting heights from 25 to 75 mm: central adjustment button sets all 4 wheels with a single press, with a visual indicator of the selected level. • Comfort and storage: anti-vibration foam Confort Pro handle, height-adjustable and foldable; vertical storage for a minimal footprint. • 40 L collection box: large capacity with a fill-level indicator to avoid clogging and interruptions; net weight of 12 kg for easy everyday handling.

product.name: RURIS RXI3744e – Cordless Lawn Mower 2x20V, 37 cm Cutting Width, 3-in-1, 2x 4Ah Batteries Included
product.description:
The RURIS RXI3744e cordless lawn mower pairs a 2x20V brushless motor (40V, 160 Wh) with a 37 cm cutting width to maintain lawns of up to 650 m². Cutting height is adjustable from 25 to 75 mm, and the 3-in-1 function offers collection in the 35 L bag, rear discharge or mulching. Lightweight (13 kg) and quiet, it comes with 2 RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries with USB-C charging.
• 40V power: brushless motor powered by 2x 20V 4Ah batteries (160 Wh) and a 37 cm cutting width for gardens up to 650 m². • 3-in-1 function: collection in the 35 L bag, rear discharge, or mulching to redistribute the finely cut grass over the lawn. • Adjustable cut: cutting height from 25 to 75 mm, with 15 cm front and 20 cm rear wheels for easy manoeuvring around flower beds. • Quiet in residential areas: mows without noise nuisance, fuel or exhaust fumes, with a contained weight of 13 kg. • 2 batteries included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries with bidirectional USB-C charging, also usable as a power bank.

product.name: RURIS RXI4344e – Cordless Lawn Mower 2x20V, 43 cm Cutting Width, 3-in-1, 2x 4Ah Batteries Included
product.description:
The RURIS RXI4344e cordless lawn mower runs on 2x 20V 4Ah batteries (40V) and offers a 43 cm cutting width for gardens of 400 to 650 m². Cutting height adjusts from 25 to 75 mm across 6 positions, with a 3-in-1 function (collection, rear discharge, mulching) and a large 50 L grass bag. Its large 25 cm rear wheels make mowing easier on uneven ground. 2 ALFA UP 2400e batteries included, with USB-C charging.
• Wide cutting width: 43 cm on 2x20V power (160 Wh) to cover more ground with every pass, for lawns up to 650 m². • 3-in-1 function: collection in the 50 L bag, rear discharge or mulching, depending on the season and the condition of the lawn. • 6-position cutting height: adjustment from 25 to 75 mm for a finish suited to every type of grass. • Stable on uneven terrain: large 25 cm rear wheels and 17.5 cm front wheels for better traction, with a weight of 13.5 kg. • 2 batteries included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries with bidirectional USB-C charging, also usable as a power bank.

product.name: RURIS RX200S – Petrol Lawn Mower 2.7 HP, 42 cm Cutting Width, 45 L Grass Box, 3-in-1 Mulching, up to 1300 m²
product.description:
The RURIS RX200S petrol lawn mower maintains lawns of up to 1300 m² with no cable to hold you back. Its 2.7 HP 4-stroke engine drives a 42 cm blade, with 3 functions: collection in a 45 L box, rear discharge and mulching to fertilise the lawn. Cutting height adjusts from 25 to 75 mm over 5 positions, and the pressed steel chassis ensures a long service life. Foldable handlebar and grass box for compact storage.
• High-performance petrol engine: 2.7 HP 4-stroke engine and 42 cm cutting width to mow lawns up to 1300 m² efficiently, with no power cable. • 3-in-1 versatility: collection in the 45 L box, rear discharge, or mulching that finely shreds the grass and naturally fertilises the lawn. • Adjustable cutting height: 5 positions from 25 to 75 mm to adapt mowing to the season, grass type and desired result. • Durable construction: pressed steel chassis resistant to impacts and wear, built for regular use season after season. • Easy transport and storage: ergonomic handle, foldable handlebar and grass box for compact storage in the garden shed or garage.

product.name: RURIS RX221S – Petrol Lawn Mower 3.5 HP, 42 cm Cutting Width, 45 L Grass Box, 3-in-1 Mulching, up to 1500 m²
product.description:
The RURIS RX221S petrol lawn mower is designed for lawns of up to 1500 m². Its 3.5 HP 4-stroke engine and 42 cm cutting width ensure fast mowing, with 3 modes to choose from: collection in the 45 L box, rear discharge or mulching. The pressed steel chassis and four wheels deliver strength and manoeuvrability, while cutting height adjusts from 25 to 75 mm over 5 positions. Foldable handlebar and grass box.
• Power and efficiency: 3.5 HP 4-stroke engine paired with a 42 cm cutting width to maintain lawns of up to 1500 m² effortlessly. • 3-in-1 versatility: collection in the 45 L box, rear discharge, or mulching to naturally feed the lawn with finely shredded grass. • Tailored cut: cutting height adjustable from 25 to 75 mm in 5 positions, for a lawn suited to the season and your preferences. • Strength and manoeuvrability: pressed steel chassis, adjustable ergonomic handlebar and four wheels for stable handling on uneven terrain. • Easy storage: foldable handlebar and grass box save space in storage and make transport simple, with no cable restrictions.

product.name: RURIS Gospodar A1 – Hammer Grain Mill 2700 W, 180 kg/h, 4 Sieves 2-5 mm, 50 L Bag
product.description:
The RURIS Gospodar A1 hammer grain mill grinds maize, wheat and barley at up to 180 kg/h thanks to its 2700 W electric motor (220 V, 2850 rpm) with direct drive. Its 20 hammers, 2 knives and 4 interchangeable sieves from 2 to 5 mm let you choose the grind, from coarse grain to fine flour. The exclusive RURIS Anti-Reflux system reduces material loss by up to 98%; 50 L collection bag included.
• Powerful motor: 2700 W at 220 V running at 2850 rpm with direct drive, for a grinding capacity of up to 180 kg/h of grain. • Your choice of grind: 4 interchangeable sieves from 2 to 5 mm to obtain coarse grain or fine flour, depending on use (animal feed or consumption). • RURIS Anti-Reflux system: unground grain is returned to the processing chamber, reducing material loss by up to 98%. • Controlled feeding: two channels (side for small volumes, top for large volumes) and a flow adjustment rod for consistent output. • Ready to use: 20 hammers, 2 knives, 50 L collection bag and built-in on/off switch; workbench mounting, 18.8 kg with accessories.

product.name: RURIS VoltX 3864e – 60V Brushless Brush Cutter, 420 mm Cutting Width, 4Ah Battery and Charger Included
product.description:
The RURIS VoltX 3864e cordless brush cutter combines a 60V brushless motor with direct drive (6000 rpm) and a dual cutting system: 2.4 mm line over 420 mm and a 3-tooth 350 mm blade. Ideal for maintaining plots, embankments and areas of dense vegetation, with a modular shaft and multifunction display. Supplied with an ALFA UP 6400e 60V 4Ah battery and charger included.
