• 60V brushless power: direct-drive motor running at 6000 rpm, with torque comparable to a 1.5 to 2 HP petrol engine and no loss of speed in dense vegetation. • Versatile: dual 2.4 mm Bump Feed line head (420 mm cut) for grass and a 3-tooth blade (350 mm) for brambles and woody brush, interchangeable without tools. • Multifunction display: battery level and speed shown in real time; modular 26 mm shaft with quick coupling for easy transport and storage. • Extended comfort: curved Soft Grip handle with anti-vibration system and shoulder harness included to reduce fatigue during long working sessions. • Battery and charger included: RURIS ALFA UP 6400e 60V 4Ah (240 Wh) Li-Ion battery with digital display, compatible with all tools in the VoltX range.

product.name: RURIS 3044e – 2x20V Brushless Brush Cutter, 300 mm Line, 255 mm Blade, 2 Batteries Included
product.description:
The RURIS 3044e is a cordless brush cutter with a brushless motor powered by 2x 20V 4Ah batteries (40V, 160 Wh) for extended runtime. Its dual cutting system (300 mm line and 255 mm 3-tooth blade) handles grass and woody brush. Ideal for maintaining medium-sized areas. Supplied with 2 ALFA UP 2400e batteries with bidirectional USB-C charging and a USB-C cable.
• 2x20V (40V) power: brushless motor powered by 2x 4Ah batteries totalling 160 Wh, for longer runtime than single-battery models. • Versatile cutting: 300 mm line head for grass and a 255 mm 3-tooth blade for woody brush, interchangeable without switching machines. • 2 batteries included with USB-C charging: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries rechargeable from any USB-C port without a mains charger; they also serve as a power bank for your devices. • Extended comfort: ergonomic 2-segment handles and reduced vibration for maintaining gardens, borders and dense areas without fatigue. • Box contents: 3044e brush cutter, 2 ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries with LED display, USB-C cable, 300 mm line head, 255 mm 3-tooth blade, harness.

product.name: RURIS 3144e – 2x20V Brushless Brush Cutter, Modular Shaft, 300 mm Cutting Width, 2 Batteries Included
product.description:
The RURIS 3144e is a cordless brush cutter with a 2x20V (40V, 160 Wh) brushless motor running at 7500 rpm, delivering power close to entry-level petrol models with no fuel or engine maintenance. Dual cutting system: 300 mm line and 255 mm 3-tooth blade. Its modular shaft makes transport and storage easy. Supplied with 2 ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries with USB-C charging.
• 2x20V power (40V, 160 Wh): brushless motor at 7500 rpm that maintains high torque in thick grass, brambles and brush, with no loss of speed. • Tool-free dual cutting: 1.6 mm Bump Feed line head (300 mm diameter) for finishing work and a 3-tooth blade (255 mm) for woody vegetation. • Modular 26 mm shaft: splits into 2 segments to fit in a small car boot and store in a compact space. • Working comfort: ergonomic shoulder harness, loop handle and low vibration (2.92 m/s²) for extended sessions on lawns, embankments and borders. • 2 batteries included: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah with LED display and bidirectional USB-C charging, also usable as a power bank; USB-C cable supplied.

product.name: RURIS RR240 BRAVO – Petrol Brush Cutter 24 cm³ 1 HP, 255 mm Cutting Width, Flexible Shaft, 3.8 kg
product.description:
The RURIS RR240 BRAVO petrol brush cutter maintains lawns, borders, embankments and overgrown areas thanks to its 24 cm³ (1 HP) 2-stroke engine. Very lightweight (3.8 kg), it combines a flexible drive shaft that reduces vibration with a digital monitoring display (engine speed, usage time, maintenance alerts). Supplied with a 2-tooth blade, Autocut trimmer head and harness, it is ready to use.
• High-performance 2-stroke engine: 24 cm³ displacement delivering 1 HP to cut tall grass and brush over a 255 mm width. • Lightweight and manoeuvrable: only 3.8 kg for extended sessions without fatigue, ideal for maintaining gardens, borders and plots far from any power outlet. • Multifunction digital display: shows engine speed, usage time and the clock, with maintenance alerts for the filter, spark plug and gearbox. • Working comfort: flexible drive shaft for reduced vibration, adjustable ergonomic handles and a single-strap harness that distributes the weight. • Accessories included: 2-tooth blade and Autocut line trimmer head to alternate between grass and woody vegetation, plus a harness for immediate use.

product.name: RURIS RR241 BRAVO – Petrol Brush Cutter 24 cm³ 1 HP, 255 mm Cutting Width, Rigid Shaft, 3.9 kg
product.description:
The RURIS RR241 BRAVO petrol brush cutter is designed for maintaining your garden, land or orchard. Its KHUMMA 24 cm³ (1 HP) 2-stroke engine and rigid shaft ensure optimal power transfer, even under intensive use. Lightweight (3.9 kg), it features a digital display with maintenance alerts. Supplied with a 3-tooth blade, Autocut trimmer head and a comfortable harness.
• Reliable KHUMMA-design engine: 2-stroke, 24 cm³ and 1 HP for consistent cutting of dense grass and brush over a 255 mm width. • Rigid drive shaft: greater durability and optimal power transfer to the cutting tool, suited to intensive work and large areas. • Smart digital display: tracks usage time and rotation speed, with maintenance alerts for the filter, spark plug and gearbox. • Light and accessible: only 3.9 kg for prolonged use without fatigue, with a harness supplied for comfortable work on overgrown land. • Accessories included: 3-tooth blade for woody vegetation and Autocut line trimmer head for grass, plus a harness, for immediate operation.

product.name: RURIS DAC 201RS – Petrol Chainsaw 1.5 HP 25.4 cc, 300 mm Guide Bar, Easy Start, Pruning
product.description:
The RURIS DAC 201RS is a lightweight 1.5 HP (25.4 cc) petrol chainsaw fitted with a 300 mm guide bar and a 3/8" 1.3 PM chain, ideal for pruning, wood carving and precision DIY work. The Easy Start system ensures quick, effortless starting, while its 2.86 kg weight guarantees excellent manoeuvrability. Fuel tank of 190 ml and oil tank of 140 ml for extended working sessions.
• TEZ 2-stroke 1.5 HP engine: 25.4 cc displacement for reliable performance on precision work, light pruning and neat finishing. • Easy starting: the Easy Start system reduces starting effort for quick start-up, even from cold. • 300 mm guide bar and 3/8" 1.3 PM chain: clean, stable cuts with good versatility for branches and small trunks. • Ultra-lightweight: at just 2.86 kg, it moves easily from one position to another and limits fatigue during extended use. • Comfortable autonomy: 190 ml fuel tank and 140 ml oil tank to keep cutting without frequent stops.

product.name: RURIS DAC 205RS – Petrol Chainsaw 1.5 HP 25.4 cc, 200 mm Guide Bar, Easy Start, Carving
product.description:
The RURIS DAC 205RS is a compact 1.5 HP (25.4 cc) petrol chainsaw with a 200 mm guide bar and a 1/4-1.1 chain, designed for wood carving, light pruning and precision DIY work. Its Easy Start system allows effortless starting, and its low weight of 3.4 kg ensures excellent manoeuvrability. The 190 ml fuel tank and 140 ml oil tank provide good autonomy for extended sessions.
• TEZ 2-stroke 1.5 HP engine: 25.4 cc displacement for consistent performance on precision work, wood carving and delicate finishing. • Effortless starting: the Easy Start system reduces pull resistance for quick start-up, even after a period of inactivity. • 200 mm guide bar and 1/4-1.1 chain: clean, stable and precise cuts, ideal for detail work and small diameters. • Light and manoeuvrable: only 3.4 kg for optimal control and prolonged, comfortable use without excessive fatigue. • Good autonomy: 190 ml fuel tank and 140 ml oil tank to work longer without frequent stops.

product.name: RURIS DAC 318EL – Electric Chainsaw 1800 W, 35 cm Guide Bar, 3/8 Chain, Auto Lubrication
product.description:
The RURIS DAC 318EL electric chainsaw pairs a 1800 W motor with a 35 cm guide bar to cut logs and branches quickly and cleanly. Quiet and emission-free, it suits both firewood cutting and garden pruning, with instant starting and no petrol or carburettor maintenance. Built-in chain tensioning and automatic lubrication simplify upkeep, all at a manageable weight of 4.7 kg.
• Reliable 1800 W power: high-performance electric motor driving a 35 cm guide bar for fast, clean cuts through logs and branches. • Quiet and emission-free: instant start-up on 230 V mains power, with no petrol mix or exhaust fumes, ideal for wood-heated homes. • 3/8 inch chain (1.3 mm): smooth, continuous cutting with reduced risk of jamming; quick chain tensioning system. • Simplified maintenance: automatic chain lubrication and vibration limited to 5.79 m/s² for comfortable, extended work. • Light and manoeuvrable: only 4.7 kg for easy handling when cutting firewood and pruning in the garden.

product.name: RURIS DAC 320EL – Electric Chainsaw 2000 W, 40 cm Bar, 3/8 Chain, Automatic Lubrication
product.description:
The RURIS DAC 320EL electric chainsaw delivers 2000 W through a 40 cm bar, making short work of logs and thicker trunks. Clean and quiet, it is ideal for firewood and regular pruning, with instant starting and no fuel or engine maintenance. The built-in chain tensioning and automatic lubrication keep upkeep to a minimum, all at a weight of 5.1 kg with accessories.
• 2000 W motor: consistent performance on all wood types, with a 40 cm bar suited to logs and thicker trunks. • Clean and quiet: electric operation on 230 V mains power, with no petrol mix or exhaust fumes, safe to use near the house. • 3/8-inch chain (1.3 mm): smooth, fast cutting with reduced risk of jamming thanks to the automatic tensioner. • Minimal maintenance: built-in chain tensioning and automatic lubrication, with no carburettor or spark plug to service. • Handy and stable: 5.1 kg with accessories for a good balance between stability and comfort during extended cutting.

product.name: RURIS DAC 324EL – Electric Chainsaw 2400 W, 40 cm Bar, 3/8 Chain, Automatic Lubrication
product.description:
The RURIS DAC 324EL electric chainsaw, the most powerful in the range at 2400 W, drives a 40 cm bar for clean cuts in both hardwood and softwood. Ideal for firewood and construction work, it rivals petrol models without the noise or emissions. Dampened vibrations (6.84 m/s² at the front), an easy-access tensioner and automatic lubrication ensure comfort and reduced maintenance.
• 2400 W, the most powerful in the electric range: fast, efficient cuts in hardwood or softwood with a 40 cm bar. • Versatile: suited to bucking logs, firewood and construction work, at home or on site. • 3/8-inch chain (1.3 mm): smooth, continuous cutting with fewer jams; easy-access tensioner. • Enhanced comfort: dampened vibrations (6.84 m/s² at the front, 4.93 m/s² at the rear) and quiet operation for extended use. • Instant start: 230 V mains power, with no fuel or engine maintenance; automatic chain lubrication; 5.2 kg with accessories.

product.name: RURIS MP35 – 4-Stroke Petrol Water Pump for Irrigation and Water Transfer, Portable
product.description:
The RURIS MP35 petrol water pump handles irrigation and clean water transfer in the garden, on the farm or on site. Its 4-stroke petrol engine with manual start runs fully independently, with no need for mains electricity: ideal for watering crops, draining ponds and tanks, or pumping in remote areas. Compact and mobile at 9.1 kg, it keeps up with all your pumping needs.
• Self-contained pumping: 4-stroke petrol engine that moves large volumes of clean water without any electrical supply. • Versatile: crop and garden irrigation, draining ponds and tanks, water transfer on the farm or on site. • Standard fittings: suction and discharge ports in common sizes for easy connection of hoses and strainers. • Mobile and compact: around 9.1 kg, easy to carry to the field or to remote areas, with manual recoil start. • Designed for clean water: a reliable solution for regular agricultural watering and backup pumping, with simple maintenance.

product.name: RURIS 120EL – Electric Tiller 1200 W, 400 mm Working Width, 220 mm Depth, Electronic Brake
product.description:
The RURIS 120EL electric tiller is a quiet, emission-free solution for light garden work. Its 1200 W motor loosens the soil over a 400 mm width and to a depth of 220 mm, a format ideal for small vegetable gardens, greenhouses and hard-to-reach areas. Lightweight (9.7 kg) and low in vibration, it features an electronic brake for immediate, safe stopping.
• 1200 W electric motor: all the power needed to loosen soil in gardens, greenhouses and hard-to-reach areas. • Precise work: 400 mm working width and 220 mm depth for quickly preparing growing beds and borders. • Enhanced safety: electronic brake that stops the tines immediately in any situation. • Lightweight and comfortable: only 9.7 kg with low vibration, easy to use even for occasional gardeners. • Quiet and fuel-free: mains-powered operation with no petrol or engine maintenance, ideal for residential areas.

product.name: RURIS 4044e – Cordless Tiller 2x20V Brushless, 30 cm Working Width, 6 Blades, 2x 4Ah Batteries Included
product.description:
The RURIS 4044e is a lightweight (9.65 kg) battery-powered tiller with a 2x20V brushless motor, working the soil over a 30 cm width and to a 20 cm depth with its 6 blades. Instant starting, with no fuel or emissions: ideal for vegetable gardens, greenhouses and polytunnels. Supplied with 2 ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries with bidirectional USB-C charging and a USB-C cable.
• Durable brushless motor: constant power at 280 rpm with no wear parts to replace, plus a safety switch built into the handle. • Light and agile: only 9.65 kg, 3 to 4 times lighter than a petrol tiller; instant start with no pull cord, usable in greenhouses with zero emissions. • Efficient soil work: 30 cm width, up to 20 cm depth and 6 blades (3 left / 3 right) for quickly preparing garden and vegetable beds. • Remarkable comfort: very low vibration (0.78 m/s²) and transport wheels adjustable across 4 positions for precise depth setting. • 2 batteries included: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah with LED display and bidirectional USB-C charging, also usable as a power bank; USB-C cable supplied.

product.name: RURIS 5505 – Petrol Tiller 4 HP, 4-Stroke 173 cm³ Engine, 360 mm Working Width, Compact 27 kg
product.description:
The RURIS 5505 petrol tiller is designed for maintaining small gardens and vegetable plots. Its General Engine 4-stroke 4 HP (173 cm³) engine with electronic ignition drives the tines through a belt transmission with an aluminium alloy housing. With a 360 mm working width, a depth of 100 to 260 mm and an average output of 400 m²/h, it is a compact machine of around 27 kg.
• Reliable engine: General Engine 4-stroke 4 HP (173 cm³) with electronic ignition and manual start, running on unleaded petrol. • Compact format: 360 mm working width and adjustable depth from 100 to 260 mm, ideal between rows and in tight spaces. • Protected transmission: belt drive with aluminium alloy housing and 1 forward gear, simple to use and maintain. • Light and manoeuvrable: around 27 kg with accessories and a 0.9 L fuel tank, covering an average of 400 m² per hour. • Ready to work: supplied with a set of tines and a user manual; 0.5 L oil sump for proper engine lubrication.

product.name: RURIS 1031 – Adjustable Watering Gun with Connectors for Garden Hose, Adjustable Spray
product.description:
The RURIS 1031 adjustable watering gun attaches to your garden hose with the supplied connectors for precise, comfortable watering. Its adjustable spray switches from a concentrated jet to a fine shower as needed: delicate plants, flower beds, the vegetable garden or cleaning patios. Compact and lightweight, it offers an ergonomic grip with a flow-control trigger.
• Spray adjustable on demand: from a concentrated jet to a fine shower, so each plant gets just the right intensity. • Versatile every day: waters lawns, flower beds and vegetable gardens, and cleans patios, paths and vehicles depending on the mode chosen. • Connectors included: fits straight onto the garden hose, with quick coupling compatible with standard watering systems. • Compact and handy: only 0.21 kg, with an ergonomic handle and flow trigger for fatigue-free watering. • Box contents: 1031 adjustable watering gun with quick-connect couplings.

product.name: RURIS 1071 – Adjustable Watering Gun with Connectors, Adjustable Spray for Watering and Cleaning
product.description:
With the RURIS 1071 adjustable watering gun, watering becomes precise and comfortable. Supplied with its connectors, it fits straight onto the garden hose. The spray adjusts from a fine shower to a powerful jet for watering lawns, flower beds and vegetable gardens, or cleaning patios and vehicles. Its ergonomic handle with trigger lets you meter the flow effortlessly.
• Spray adjustable to the task: from a fine shower for fragile plants to a powerful jet for cleaning surfaces. • Versatile use: ideal for watering lawns, flower beds and vegetable gardens, but also for washing patios, paths and vehicles. • Ready to use: connectors supplied for quick coupling to the garden hose, compatible with standard watering systems. • Ergonomic and light: comfortable handle with flow trigger, only 0.32 kg for easy, extended handling. • Box contents: 1071 adjustable watering gun with quick-connect couplings.

product.name: RURIS 1072 – Adjustable Watering Gun with Connectors, Multi-Mode Adjustable Spray for the Garden
product.description:
The RURIS 1072 adjustable watering gun comes with its connectors and attaches to the garden hose in one simple move. Its adjustable spray switches from a concentrated jet to a fine shower: gentle watering of plants, flower beds and the vegetable garden, or cleaning patios and vehicles. The ergonomic handle with flow trigger ensures a comfortable, precise grip.
• Multi-mode adjustable spray: from a concentrated jet to a fine shower, matching the water's power to every garden task. • Versatile: waters lawns, flower beds, planters and the vegetable garden, and cleans patios, paths and vehicles with the right mode. • Connectors included: supplied with its fittings for immediate mounting on the garden hose, compatible with standard watering systems. • Comfortable in use: ergonomic handle with flow-control trigger for precise, fatigue-free watering. • Box contents: 1072 adjustable watering gun with quick-connect couplings.

product.name: RURIS 8JET – Watering Lance with 8-Pattern Spray Head, Long Handle, for Garden Watering and Cleaning
product.description:
The RURIS 8JET watering lance features a spray head with 8 selectable jet modes: rain, jet, shower, mist and more. Its long handle reaches flower beds, hanging baskets and low areas without bending down. Ideal for watering lawns, plants and planters or cleaning patios and vehicles, with an ergonomic handle and quick hose connection.
• 8 selectable spray modes: multi-pattern head (rain, jet, shower, mist and more) to suit the watering to every plant and every task. • Versatile: waters lawns, flower beds and planters, and cleans patios, paths and vehicles with the appropriate jet. • Practical long handle: reaches hanging baskets and low areas without bending, for comfortable watering. • Comfortable to use: ergonomic handle with trigger and quick connection to a standard garden hose. • Box contents: 8JET watering lance with 8-pattern spray head and long handle.

product.name: RURIS RMX4125 – Cordless Angle Grinder 20V Brushless 125 mm, 2 Speeds, 4Ah Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX4125 cordless angle grinder cuts and grinds metal, tiles and stone thanks to its 20V brushless motor with 2 speeds (2600 and 8500 rpm) and 125 mm disc. Lightweight at 1.6 kg, it suits DIYers and tradespeople alike. Battery and charger included: an ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C charging and cable, plus a 125 mm disc and auxiliary handle.
• 2-speed brushless motor: 2600 rpm for sanding and finishing, 8500 rpm for cutting and roughing, with a 125 mm disc compatible with standard accessories. • Versatile and mobile: cuts metal, tiles and stone anywhere, with no cord or socket, where a corded grinder falls short. • Battery and charger included: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C port and cable; charges from any USB-C port and doubles as a power bank for your devices. • Safety and comfort: adjustable guard, disc-lock button for quick accessory changes, 2-position auxiliary handle and a contained weight of 1.6 kg. • Kit contents: RMX4125 grinder, 20V 4Ah battery with LED indicator and USB-C cable, 125 mm sanding disc, auxiliary handle; the battery also powers your other RURIS 20V tools.

product.name: RURIS RA1050 – Angle Grinder 1050 W, 125 mm Disc, 11000 rpm, Power Off, Multi-Material
product.description:
The RURIS RA1050 angle grinder delivers 1050 W and 11000 rpm for cutting, grinding and polishing metal, concrete, stone and wood. Its 125 mm disc ensures fine cuts and clean finishes, while the Power Off system protects against overloads and accidental restarts. Lightweight (2.2 kg) and easy to handle, it suits everyday DIY as well as renovation work.
• 1050 W of power: effective cutting, grinding and polishing on metal, concrete, stone and wood, with a great power-to-weight ratio. • 11000 rpm speed: fast, precise and consistent cutting, even in hard-to-reach areas. • 125 mm disc: perfect for fine cuts, detailed adjustments and clean finishes, with excellent manoeuvrability. • Power Off system: overload protection and a safety cut-out that prevents any accidental restart after a power interruption. • Light and ergonomic: only 2.2 kg, with an auxiliary handle and protective guard for lasting comfort.

product.name: RURIS RA1100V – Angle Grinder 1000 W, 125 mm Disc, Variable Speed 3000-11000 rpm, 230 V
product.description:
The RURIS RA1100V angle grinder is a versatile 1000 W power tool for cutting, grinding and polishing metal, concrete, stone and wood. Its variable speed from 3000 to 11000 rpm adapts to each material, while the switch lock reduces fatigue during extended work. Easy to handle with its 125 mm disc, it suits DIY and renovation alike, in the workshop or on site.
• 1000 W motor: constant power to cut, grind and polish metal, concrete, stone and wood efficiently. • Variable speed 3000-11000 rpm: speed adjustable to the material being worked, for precise cuts without overheating. • 125 mm disc: a handy format ideal for fine cuts, precise adjustments and clean finishes. • Comfort and safety: switch lock, auxiliary handle and protective guard for controlled, less tiring work. • Compact and light: around 2.3 kg with reduced vibration, practical for everyday DIY and renovation.

product.name: RURIS RA1200V – Angle Grinder 1200 W, 125 mm Diamond Disc, Variable Speed, Power Off
product.description:
The RURIS RA1200V angle grinder pairs a 1200 W motor with a variable speed of 3000 to 11000 rpm for cutting, grinding and polishing metal, concrete, stone and wood. Supplied with a 125 mm diamond disc, it features the Power Off system against overloads and accidental restarts. A precise, safe tool for demanding renovation work, in the workshop or on site.
• 1200 W motor: a reserve of power to cut, grind and polish metal, concrete, stone and wood. • Variable speed 3000-11000 rpm: speed matched to each material for optimal cutting without overheating. • 125 mm diamond disc included: fine cuts, detailed adjustments and neat finishes straight out of the box. • Power Off system: overload protection and a safety cut-out preventing any accidental restart after a power interruption. • Ergonomic and compact: around 2.4 kg with reduced vibration, auxiliary handle and protective guard for comfortable use.

product.name: RURIS RA2400S – Angle Grinder 2400 W, 230 mm Diamond Disc, Soft Start, 3-Position Handle
product.description:
The RURIS RA2400S angle grinder is built for heavy-duty work: its 2400 W motor drives a 230 mm diamond disc to cut and grind metal, concrete and stone across large sections. The progressive Soft Start protects the motor, while the soft-grip handle adjustable across 3 positions absorbs vibration. Ideal for site work and demanding DIY.
• 2400 W of power: tackles hard materials such as metal, concrete and stone, even on large sections. • 230 mm diamond disc included: high cutting capacity where 125 mm grinders reach their limits. • Soft Start: smooth start-up that protects the motor from jolts and makes the tool easier to control from the moment it starts. • 3-position adjustable soft-grip handle: absorbs vibration, reduces fatigue and ensures a firm two-handed hold. • Enhanced safety: adjustable protective guard and ergonomic design for intensive professional use.

product.name: RURIS RA850 – 850 W Angle Grinder, 125 mm Disc, 11000 rpm, Power Off System, Soft Grip Handle
product.description:
The RURIS RA850 angle grinder combines an 850 W motor with a speed of 11000 rpm to cut, grind and polish metal, concrete, stone and wood. Compact and lightweight, it comes with a 125 mm diamond disc and features the Power Off system for overload protection. Its soft grip handle and adjustable guard make it a safe, comfortable tool for DIY work and small renovations.
• 850 W motor: steady power to cut, grind and polish metal, concrete, stone or wood with precision. • 125 mm disc at 11000 rpm: ideal for fine cuts, detailed adjustments and everyday precision work. • Power Off system: protects against overloads and prevents accidental restart after a power cut. • Soft grip handle and reduced vibrations: comfortable hold that limits fatigue during prolonged work. • Diamond disc included and adjustable guard: ready to use, with easy disc changes thanks to the spindle lock.

product.name: RURIS Aqua Pump 1100S – Self-Priming Surface Pump for Garden, Irrigation and Water Supply
product.description:
The RURIS Aqua Pump 1100S self-priming surface pump supplies water to your home and garden by drawing water from a well, cistern or stream. It primes automatically, with no refilling needed at each start, and delivers a constant flow for taps, sprinklers and drip irrigation systems. Robust and easy to install, it runs on 230 V mains power.
• Self-priming: primes automatically to draw water from a well, cistern or stream, with no refilling at each start. • Versatile use: household water supply, garden and vegetable patch irrigation, sprinklers and drip irrigation systems. • Constant flow: designed for domestic use and regular crop watering, with reliable operation. • Easy installation: surface pump running on 230 V mains, no immersion required, simple to connect and put into service. • Robust and durable: reliable construction built for regular use in the garden as well as on small farms.

product.name: RURIS Aqua Pump 800S – 750 W Self-Priming Surface Pump, 2.9 m³/h Flow, 40 m Delivery Head
product.description:
The RURIS Aqua Pump 800S self-priming surface pump draws clean water from wells, lakes or cisterns with its 750 W single-phase 230 V motor. It delivers a flow rate of 2.9 m³/h, a delivery head of 40 m and a suction depth of 9 m. Cast iron body, bronze impeller and PPO diffuser ensure longevity. Ideal for irrigation and pressure boosting.
• 750 W motor: maximum flow of 2.9 m³/h and 40 m delivery head for water supply and irrigation. • Suction up to 9 m: self-priming, it draws clean water from wells, lakes or cisterns without refilling at each start. • Durable materials: cast iron body, bronze impeller and PPO diffuser for a long service life, IP44 protection. • Versatile use: household water supply, crop irrigation and pressure boosting, up to 30 starts per hour. • Simple installation: surface pump running on 230 V mains with a 1-inch connection, suitable for clean water up to 35 °C.

product.name: RURIS Aqua 101 – 750 W Clean Water Submersible Pump, 60 m Delivery Head, Bronze Impeller, Control Panel
product.description:
The RURIS Aqua 101 submersible pump transfers clean water from drilled wells and tanks with its 750 W motor, delivering a head of 60 m and a flow rate of 2.4 m³/h. Stainless steel body, bronze impeller, oil-cooled motor and 100% copper winding guarantee a long service life. Supplied with a 15 m cable and control panel for immediate commissioning.
• Reliable performance: 750 W motor, 60 m delivery head and 2.4 m³/h flow rate to supply homes and irrigation systems. • Versatile use: transfers clean water from drilled wells or tanks, with an immersion depth of up to 15 m. • Premium materials: stainless steel body and bronze impeller for increased durability, even in demanding conditions. • IP68 protection: oil-cooled motor with 100% copper winding, designed to handle up to 30 starts per hour. • Box contents: pump, control panel and 15 m power cable for immediate installation.

product.name: RURIS Aqua 104 – 1100 W Borehole Submersible Pump, 100 m Delivery Head, 30 m Cable, Control Panel Included
product.description:
The RURIS Aqua 104 submersible pump supplies clean water to homes and irrigation systems from deep wells and boreholes. Its 1100 W screw-type motor delivers a head of 100 m with a flow rate of 1.8 m³/h. 4-inch stainless steel body, oil-bath motor with 100% copper winding (IP68). Supplied with control panel and 30 m power cable.
• 100 m delivery head: 1100 W screw-type motor providing a 1.8 m³/h flow rate, ideal for deep wells and boreholes. • Domestic and agricultural use: clean water supply for homes and irrigation, compatible with a booster system. • 4-inch stainless steel body: oil-bath-cooled motor with 100% copper winding and IP68 protection for longevity. • Steady flow at depth: designed for clean water (particles up to 0.05 mm), immersion up to 15 m. • Box contents: pump, control panel and long 30 m power cable for flexible installation.

product.name: RURIS Aqua 105 – 1500 W Borehole Submersible Pump, 140 m Delivery Head, Stainless Steel, 30 m Cable, IP68
product.description:
The RURIS Aqua 105 submersible pump is designed for very deep wells: its 1500 W motor and 3 stages deliver an exceptional head of 140 m with a flow rate of 2.6 m³/h. 4-inch stainless steel body and oil-bath motor with 100% copper winding (IP68) for durability. Supplied with control panel and 30 m power cable.
• Exceptional 140 m delivery head: 1500 W motor and 3 pumping stages for very deep wells and high pressure. • 2.6 m³/h flow rate: reliable clean water supply for houses, cottages and demanding irrigation systems. • 4-inch stainless steel construction: oil-bath-cooled motor and 100% copper winding for maximum durability. • IP68 protection: immersion up to 15 m, designed for clean water with particles up to 0.05 mm. • Box contents: pump, control panel and 30 m power cable for installation at great depths.

product.name: RURIS Aqua 11S – 550 W Clean Water Submersible Pump, 25 m Delivery Head, 3.6 m³/h Flow, Float Switch
product.description:
The RURIS Aqua 11S submersible pump supplies clean water to houses, cottages and gardens from a well, fountain or tank. Its 550 W motor delivers a head of 25 m with a flow rate of 3.6 m³/h, ideal for irrigation and drip watering. Durable aluminium body (IP68), automatic safety float switch and 15 m power cable.
• 25 m delivery head: 550 W motor delivering a 3.6 m³/h flow rate, perfect for drawing clean water from a well or tank. • Versatile use: water supply for houses, villas and cottages, garden irrigation and drip watering systems. • IP68 aluminium body: tough casing and impeller for durable immersion and a long, maintenance-free service life. • Safety float switch: automatic start and stop according to the water level, with dry-running protection. • Flexible installation: 15 m power cable to position the pump easily, even far from the socket; weight of 9 kg.

product.name: RURIS Aqua 35 – 1300 W Dirty Water Submersible Pump with Grinder, 18 m³/h Flow, Float Switch, 10 m Cable
product.description:
The RURIS Aqua 35 submersible pump evacuates dirty and loaded water thanks to its 1300 W motor and integrated grinder that shreds particles up to 3.5 mm. With an 18 m³/h flow rate and a 12 m delivery head, it quickly empties flooded cellars, pits, ponds and tanks. Stainless steel body, cast iron impeller, automatic safety float switch and 10 m cable.
• 1300 W of power: 18 m³/h flow rate and 12 m delivery head for fast evacuation of dirty and loaded water. • Integrated grinder: shreds solid particles up to 3.5 mm, ideal for household wastewater, pits and flooded cellars. • Robust construction: abrasion-resistant stainless steel body, cast iron impeller and 100% copper winding for intensive use. • Safety float switch: automatic start and stop according to the water level, with motor protection against dry running. • Ready to use: 10 m power cable and discharge connection compatible with standard drainage hoses.

product.name: RURIS Aqua 40 – 750 W Clean Water Borehole Submersible Pump, 100 m Delivery Head, 15 m Cable, Stainless Steel
product.description:
The RURIS Aqua 40 submersible pump extracts clean water from wells and boreholes with a delivery head of up to 100 m and a flow rate of 1.8 m³/h (1880 L/h). Its 750 W motor with 100% copper winding, oil-cooled, and stainless steel body guarantee reliability and longevity. Ideal for supplying homes and irrigation; supplied with a 15 m cable and 1-inch connection.
• Delivery head up to 100 m: 750 W motor with 100% copper winding to pump clean water from deep wells and boreholes. • Versatile use: water supply for houses, villas and cottages, irrigation of small crops and drip watering systems. • 1.8 m³/h flow rate: reliable water extraction from wells, tanks or ponds, with an immersion depth of up to 15 m. • Durable construction: corrosion-resistant stainless steel body and oil-cooled motor for a long, maintenance-free service life. • Simple installation: 15 m power cable supplied, 4-inch diameter and 1-inch discharge connection for any domestic system.

product.name: RURIS Aqua 690 – 370 W Borehole Submersible Pump, 14 Stages, 60 m Delivery Head, 25 m Cable
product.description:
The RURIS Aqua 690 submersible pump is a 14-stage multistage borehole pump, ideal for narrow 3-inch wells. Its 370 W motor delivers a head of 60 m with a flow rate of 3 m³/h to supply clean water to homes and pressurised irrigation systems. Stainless steel body, PPO impeller, oil-bath motor (IP68). Supplied with control panel and 25 m cable.
• 14 pumping stages: 370 W motor delivering a 60 m head and a 3 m³/h flow rate at constant pressure. • Designed for narrow wells: 3-inch diameter, perfect for small-diameter boreholes, with immersion up to 15 m. • Durable construction: stainless steel body, PPO technopolymer impeller and oil-bath-cooled motor for maintenance-free use. • IP68 protection: 100% copper winding and full watertightness for reliable operation during prolonged immersion. • Box contents: pump, control panel and 25 m power cable for quick commissioning.

product.name: RURIS Aqua 790 – 550 W Borehole Submersible Pump, 8 Stages, 60 m Delivery Head, 25 m Cable
product.description:
The RURIS Aqua 790 submersible pump draws clean water from deep wells and boreholes with its 550 W motor and 8 pumping stages, delivering a 60 m head and a constant flow of 3 m³/h. 4-inch stainless steel body, PPO impeller and oil-bath motor (IP68, 100% copper winding). Supplied with control panel and 25 m power cable.
• 8 pumping stages: 550 W motor delivering a 60 m head and a 3 m³/h flow rate at constant pressure. • Versatile use: clean water supply for homes, cottages and irrigation systems from 4-inch wells and boreholes. • Durable construction: stainless steel body, PPO technopolymer impeller and oil-bath-cooled motor, all corrosion resistant. • Suited to clean water: particles up to 0.05 mm and sand tolerance of 150 g/m³, IP68 protection, immersion up to 15 m. • Box contents: pump, control panel and 25 m power cable for a ready-to-use installation.

product.name: RURIS DIG612 – Digital LCD Watering Timer, 1-360 min Timer, G3/4 and G1 Adapters
product.description:
The RURIS DIG612 digital watering timer automates garden irrigation: watering duration adjustable from 1 to 360 minutes and frequency from every 6 or 12 hours up to every 1 to 7 days. Its large LCD screen and big buttons make setup easy, with manual control and a start-delay function. Made of ABS and TPR, it operates at 4 to 6 bar with 2 AA batteries (not included). Supplied with a G3/4 reducer and a G1 tap adapter.
• Flexible programming: watering duration from 1 to 360 minutes and frequency adjustable to every 6 h, 12 h or 1 to 7 days, suited to every crop and season. • Simple to use: large LCD screen readable in all conditions and big buttons that are easy to operate, even with wet hands. • Full control: manually trigger a one-off watering without changing the current programme, plus a delay function to choose the start time. • Built for outdoor use: tough ABS and TPR housing, working pressure of 4 to 6 bar, temperature range of 5 to 35 °C; runs on 2 AA batteries (not included). • Box contents: timer, G3/4 reducer (26.4 mm) and G1 tap adapter (33.2 mm) for universal tool-free mounting.

product.name: RURIS M2 – Manual Watering Timer for Garden Taps, Battery-Free, Automatic Shut-Off
product.description:
The RURIS M2 manual watering timer connects directly to the garden tap and automatically shuts off the water after the set time. Fully mechanical, it works without batteries and manages the supply to sprinklers and drip irrigation systems without constant supervision. A simple solution to save water and organise the watering of your vegetable patch and lawn alike.
• Controlled watering: set the desired watering time and the water shuts off automatically at the end, no supervision needed. • Compatible: manages the supply to sprinklers, soaker hoses and drip irrigation systems connected to the garden tap. • Mechanical operation: manual timer with no batteries or electronics, simple and reliable season after season. • Water savings: prevents waste and forgotten taps by stopping the watering exactly at the set time. • Immediate installation: screws onto the garden tap without tools, very lightweight (0.21 kg) and easy to use.

product.name: RURIS RSE 1800PRO – 18 L Electric Backpack Sprayer, 6 bar, Telescopic Lance, Battery Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS RSE 1800PRO electric backpack sprayer delivers constant spraying at 6 bar with a flow rate of 4.5 L/min, ideal for gardens, orchards and vegetable crops. Its 18 L tank and metal telescopic lance with 4 interchangeable nozzles cover every type of treatment. Runs on a 20V 4Ah Li-Ion battery providing 2.5 h of runtime — battery and charger sold separately.
• Constant, effective pressure: 6 bar electric motor with a robust diaphragm pump and 4.5 L/min flow rate for uniform spraying, even on dense foliage. • Long working autonomy: 18 L tank and up to 2.5 h of operation per charge, to treat gardens, orchards and medium-sized farms without interruption. • Telescopic lance and 4 nozzles: length-adjustable metal lance and interchangeable nozzles (1, 2, 4 and 5 outlets) to adapt the spray to each crop and height. • Comfort and control: LED battery level display, automatic solution mixing and ergonomic straps distributing the weight (3.8 kg net). • No battery or charger included: runs on the RURIS 20V 4Ah Li-Ion battery, sold separately. Contents: sprayer, telescopic lance, 4 nozzles, high-pressure hose.

product.name: RURIS RSE 1900S – 18 L Electric Backpack Sprayer, 12V 8Ah Battery, 6 bar, Telescopic Lance
product.description:
The RURIS RSE 1900S electric backpack sprayer is designed for applying plant protection treatments and liquid fertilisers in the garden, orchard and vegetable patch. Its pump delivers a constant pressure of 6 bar with a flow rate of 2.9 L/min, and its built-in 12V 8Ah battery provides up to 4 hours of runtime. An 18 L tank, metal telescopic lance, LED display, automatic mixing and 5 interchangeable nozzles complete the equipment.
• Constant performance: 6 bar (87 PSI) pressure and 2.9 L/min flow rate for even, deep coverage of your crops. • Long runtime: built-in 12V 8Ah battery providing up to 4 hours of continuous use, with no manual pumping effort. • Large 18 L tank: reduces refill stops and lets you treat gardens, orchards and vegetable patches in extended sessions. • Practical technology: LED battery monitoring display, leak-proof copper connector, high-pressure hose and automatic solution mixing. • Box contents: 18 L sprayer with built-in battery and charger, metal telescopic lance and 5 nozzles (standard, 2-outlet, 3-outlet metal, 4-zone, 8-zone).

product.name: RURIS RSE 200 – Electric Sprayer 2 L, 2 Bar, Built-In 3.7V 2Ah Battery, USB-C, LED Display
product.description:
The RURIS RSE 200 electric sprayer eliminates manual pumping: its motor, powered by a built-in 3.7V 2Ah battery, delivers a constant pressure of 2 bar. The LED display shows the charge level in real time, and recharging is done via the included USB-C cable. With its 2 L tank and nozzle adjustable from a concentrated jet to a fine mist, it is ideal for regular treatments in the garden, greenhouse or indoors.
• Effortless electric spraying: the motor maintains a constant pressure of 2 bar with no manual pumping, for even application of treatments and disinfectants. • Built-in 3.7V 2Ah battery with USB-C charging: USB-C cable included for easy recharging from any USB port, with no need for mains power while you work. • LED charge indicator display: the battery level is shown in real time so you can plan your sessions and avoid unexpected interruptions. • Adjustable nozzle and On/Off button: from a concentrated jet to fine spraying, with instant start and stop without holding a trigger. • Compact and lightweight: 2 L tank, 0.45 kg empty and 2.45 kg full, ideal for plants, the greenhouse and tight spaces.

product.name: RURIS RS 2000 – Electric and Manual Sprayer 20 L, 12V 8Ah Battery and Charger Included
product.description:
The RURIS RS 2000 backpack sprayer combines electric and manual operation to adapt to every work session. Its 12V 8Ah battery, supplied with its charger, provides up to 4 hours of runtime, with a flow rate of 3.1 L/min at 5.5 bar (80 PSI) for uniform application of fertilisers and treatments. A transparent 20 L tank and a telescopic metal lance complete this versatile piece of equipment for gardeners and professionals.
• Dual electric and manual operation: maximum flexibility for long sessions as well as quick, one-off jobs in the garden. • Battery and charger included: 12V 8Ah battery providing up to 4 hours of continuous use, with no pumping effort while you work. • Uniform application: flow rate of 3.1 L/min at 5.5 bar (80 PSI) for even distribution of liquid fertilisers and plant-protection solutions. • Transparent 20 L tank: visual check of the solution level and safe refilling for treating large areas. • Telescopic metal lance: sturdy and length-adjustable for precise spraying at different heights.

product.name: RURIS RS 100 – Manual Sprayer 1 L, 2 Bar Pressure, Adjustable Copper Nozzle, Stainless Steel Rod
product.description:
The RURIS RS 100 1 L manual sprayer delivers a fine, uniform spray at 2 bar, ideal for precisely treating plants, seedlings and small areas in the garden, in the greenhouse or indoors. Its adjustable copper nozzle switches from a concentrated jet to a fine mist, and the locking handle keeps the flow constant without fatigue. Stainless steel rod resistant to corrosion; only 0.32 kg empty.
• Precise spraying at 2 bar: steady working pressure for applying plant-protection products, liquid fertilisers or disinfectants evenly, without wasting solution. • Adjustable copper nozzle: switch from a concentrated jet to fine spraying to suit the type of plant and the surface being treated. • Locking handle: the trigger lock keeps the flow constant without continuous hand pressure, for repeated treatments without fatigue. • Stainless steel rod: resistant to corrosion from common plant-protection solutions, for durability superior to plastic rods. • Compact and easy to handle: 1 L tank and a weight of 0.32 kg empty, perfect for the garden, the greenhouse and tight spaces; works without electricity or batteries.

product.name: RURIS RS 1000S – Manual Backpack Sprayer 10 L, 2-3 Bar, Metal Lance, Safety Valve
product.description:
The RURIS RS 1000S manual backpack sprayer combines a 10 L tank with a built-in pump delivering 2 to 3 bar (0.2-0.3 MPa) to treat the garden, vegetable patch and orchard without electricity or batteries. Its automatic safety valve protects against overpressure, and the funnel-shaped filling opening prevents spills. Ultra-light when empty (1.4 kg), it is carried comfortably thanks to its reinforced straps.
• 10 L tank: capacity suited to treating large areas in the garden, vegetable patch or orchard without frequent refills. • Controlled 2-3 bar pressure with safety valve: uniform application of plant-protection products and fertilisers, with automatic protection against overpressure. • Durable metal lance: resistant to wear and chemicals, for precise, even spraying over time. • Carrying comfort: only 1.4 kg empty, reinforced straps distributing the weight of the full tank (11.4 kg) and an ergonomic handle. • Easy filling and total independence: large funnel-shaped opening for pouring without spills; works without electricity or batteries, always ready to use.

product.name: RURIS RS 1600 – Manual Backpack Sprayer 16 L, Transparent Tank, Telescopic Metal Lance
product.description:
The RURIS RS 1600 manual backpack sprayer lets you apply liquid fertilisers and plant-protection solutions in the garden, vegetable patch, orchard or greenhouse. Its transparent 16 L tank shows the remaining solution level, and its telescopic metal lance ensures precise, targeted spraying. Lightweight (3.8 kg), it is carried comfortably thanks to heavy-duty straps and withstands corrosive products with minimal maintenance.
• Even spraying: the manual pressure system delivers liquid fertilisers and plant-protection treatments evenly over plants and crops. • Versatile: suitable for the garden, vegetable patch, orchard, greenhouse and for disinfection or pest-control operations in outdoor spaces. • Transparent 16 L tank: easy check of the remaining solution level and long working autonomy with fewer refills. • Carrying comfort: heavy-duty back straps and an ergonomic handle for extended sessions without fatigue, with a contained weight of 3.8 kg. • Durable and easy to maintain: sturdy materials resistant to corrosive substances and a telescopic metal lance adjustable in length.

product.name: RURIS RS 800S – Manual Backpack Sprayer 8 L, 2-3 Bar Pressure, Metal Lance, Garden and Vegetable Patch
product.description:
The RURIS RS 800S manual backpack sprayer is a lightweight, practical tool for applying plant-protection products and liquid fertilisers to small and medium areas, in the garden, vegetable patch or greenhouse. Its 8 L tank and working pressure of 2 to 3 bar (0.2-0.3 MPa) ensure even distribution, while the metal lance and heavy-duty straps guarantee durability and carrying comfort.
• 8 L tank: ideal capacity for regular treatments in the garden, vegetable patch or greenhouse, without overly frequent refills. • 2-3 bar working pressure: the manual pump ensures efficient, even distribution of plant-protection products and liquid fertilisers. • Durable metal lance: resistant to wear and chemicals, for precise spraying throughout the appliance's lifetime. • Comfortable carrying: heavy-duty straps and an ergonomic design for wearing the sprayer on your back during long work sessions. • Total independence: 100% manual operation, without electricity or batteries, always ready to use for caring for plants and crops.

product.name: RURIS LuxuryZn – 2-Way Metal Connector for Garden Tap, Adjustable Flow on Each Outlet
product.description:
The RURIS LuxuryZn 2-way metal connector screws onto the garden tap to feed two hoses or watering accessories simultaneously. Each outlet has an independent adjustment dial to open, close or regulate the flow. Its sturdy metal construction and reinforced sealing make it reliable equipment for intensive use in the garden.
• Two outlets from a single tap: feeds two hoses simultaneously, or one hose and a drip system, to manage two watering zones. • Independent adjustable flow: each outlet has its own dial to open, close or regulate the water separately as needed. • Metal construction: durable metal body for intensive, long-lasting use, far sturdier than plastic connectors. • Watertight and reliable: standard garden-tap thread and reinforced leak-free sealing; tool-free installation. • Box contents: LuxuryZn 2-way metal connector to screw onto the tap.

product.name: RURIS RXE 1808E – Electric Scarifier and Aerator 1800 W, 38 cm Working Width, 45 L Bag, 2 Rollers
product.description:
The RURIS RXE 1808E electric lawn scarifier revives your lawn with its two functions: scarifying with a 16-blade roller and aerating with a 24-spring roller, easily interchangeable. Its 1800 W motor works across a 38 cm width, with 5 adjustable heights from -12 to +6 mm. The 45 L collection bag gathers moss and thatch for a healthy, dense lawn.
• 1800 W motor: enough power to scarify and aerate residential lawns effectively, with instant mains start-up. • 2-in-1 dual function: 16-blade roller for scarifying and removing thatch, 24-spring roller for aerating the soil, interchangeable without complicated tools. • 38 cm working width: covers medium-sized areas quickly to regenerate the entire lawn in just a few passes. • 5 adjustable working heights: from -12 to +6 mm to match the depth to the type of lawn and soil condition, from light combing to deep dethatching. • 45 L collection bag: large capacity for gathering moss and debris without frequent interruptions, leaving the lawn clean after each pass.

product.name: RURIS Set 12 – Connector Kit for 1/2" Garden Hose, Quick-Fit Couplings, Tool-Free Assembly
product.description:
The RURIS Set 12 brings together the connectors needed to fit out a 1/2 inch garden hose: quick-fit couplings for connecting hose, spray gun and tap in seconds. The click-on connections ensure reinforced, leak-free sealing and fully tool-free assembly. The complete solution for setting up or extending the garden watering system.
• Complete 1/2 inch kit: all the couplings needed to connect hose, spray gun and tap and set up garden watering. • Tool-free assembly: click-on connections for one-step fitting and removal that anyone can manage. • Reinforced sealing: couplings designed for reliable, leak-free connections, compatible with standard watering systems. • Practical and expandable: ideal for installing a first watering system or replacing worn couplings on existing equipment. • Box contents: 1/2 inch connector set (quick-fit couplings for hose, spray gun and tap).

product.name: RURIS RSE 33 Easy Way – Portable Electric Sprayer, Li-Ion Battery, 3 m Hose, USB-C
product.description:
The RURIS RSE 33 Easy Way is a portable electric spraying system that draws the solution directly from a container or a water source through its suction filter. Its built-in 2600 mAh Li-Ion battery, rechargeable via USB-C, powers constant, effortless spraying. Adjustable nozzle from a concentrated jet to a fine mist, metal lance, 3 m hose and an LED display with battery indicator: lightweight, it is ideal for garden treatments.
• Effortless spraying: electric motor powered by a built-in 2600 mAh Li-Ion battery, with quick and convenient recharging via the USB Type C port. • Adjustable nozzle: switches easily from a concentrated jet to a fine mist to treat plants, vegetable patches, hedges and other garden areas with precision. • Freedom of movement: rigid metal lance and 3 m flexible hose for working at a distance from the container without frequent repositioning. • Versatile use: the suction filter allows the liquid to be pumped from a container or directly from a natural source. • Simple and lightweight: LED display with battery level indicator, one-touch On/Off control and a weight of just 576 g for easy home use.

product.name: RURIS CleanPowerJet 1100 – High-Pressure Washer 1400 W, 110 Bar, 390 L/h, Accessories Included
product.description:
The RURIS CleanPowerJet 1100 high-pressure washer is the ideal compact model for everyday cleaning jobs in the garden and around the house. Its 1400 W motor delivers up to 110 bar with a flow rate of 390 l/h for cleaning paving, patios, tools and vehicles. The lance set and foam function adapt to every surface. Supplied with spray gun, lances, spray nozzle and hose.
• Compact and efficient: 1400 W motor delivering a maximum pressure of 110 bar and a flow rate of 390 l/h for daily cleaning. • Versatile: ideal for cleaning paving, patios, garden furniture, bikes, tools and cars around the house. • Adaptable jet: interchangeable lances and foam function to adjust the jet power to the type of surface and dirt. • Built to last: quick-fit connector with integrated filter protecting the pump and 360° hose rotation preventing premature wear. • Box contents: washer, spray gun, lances, spray nozzle and high-pressure hose; 230 V power supply, lightweight and easy to store.

product.name: RURIS CleanPowerJet 1300 – High-Pressure Washer 1600 W, 130 Bar, 7 L/min, 6 m Hose
product.description:
The RURIS CleanPowerJet 1300 high-pressure washer effortlessly cleans yards, paving, garden furniture and vehicles. Its 1600 W motor delivers up to 130 bar and a flow rate of 7 l/min, with no technical knowledge required. The adjustable lance and active foam adapt to every kind of dirt, while the quick-fit connector with filter protects the pump. Supplied with spray gun, lances, spray nozzle and a 6 m hose. Weight: 6 kg.
• Powerful cleaning: 1600 W motor developing 130 bar and a flow rate of 7 l/min to remove dirt from paving, yards, facades and vehicles. • Easy to use: quick connection to the water supply and immediate handling, even without technical experience. • Adaptable jet: adjustable lance and active foam function to tailor the cleaning to the type of surface and dirt. • Durable: 360° hose rotation in the gun preventing kinks and wear; quick-fit connector with integrated filter protecting the pump. • Box contents: washer, spray gun, lances, spray nozzle and 6 m hose; 5 m power cable; 6 kg, compact and easy to store.

product.name: RURIS CleanPowerJet 1500 – High-Pressure Washer 2000 W, 160 Bar, 7.5 L/min, Turbo Jet Lance
product.description:
The RURIS CleanPowerJet 1500 high-pressure washer tackles stubborn dirt on paving, facades, patios and vehicles. Its 2000 W motor develops up to 160 bar (110 bar nominal) with a flow rate of 7.5 l/min. The adjustable lance, rotating Turbo Jet lance and active foam tank adapt to every surface. Wheel-mounted, supplied with spray gun, angled-nozzle extension, spray nozzle, brush and a 6 m hose.
• High performance: 2000 W motor delivering up to 160 bar (110 bar nominal) and 7.5 l/min to dislodge the most stubborn dirt. • Versatile: effectively cleans grimy paving, facades, patios, garden furniture and cars where entry-level models fail. • Rotating Turbo Jet lance: maximum coverage for heavily soiled surfaces, with an integrated active foam tank for car washing. • Practical and durable: moves on wheels, 360° hose rotation in the gun and a quick-fit connector with filter protecting the pump. • Box contents: washer, spray gun, angled-nozzle extension, Turbo Jet lance, spray nozzle, brush and 6 m hose; 5 m cable; 8.6 kg.

product.name: RURIS 1224e – Cordless Leaf Blower 20V, 40 m/s, 570 m³/h, 2.75 kg, Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS 1224e is a compact, ultra-light (2.75 kg) 20V cordless leaf blower with an air speed of 40 m/s and an air flow of 570 m³/h. It moves dead leaves, grass clippings and small debris on paths, patios and lawns, with no cable or fuel. Supplied with an ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with bidirectional USB-C charging and a USB-C cable.
• Efficient cleaning: air speed of 40 m/s and air flow of 570 m³/h to move leaves, grass clippings and small debris on paths, patios and lawns. • Ideal for small spaces: perfect for balconies, patios and small gardens, with quick cleaning without excessive noise or the constraints of a cable or fuel. • Very lightweight: only 2.75 kg for frequent use without fatigue, with instant start at the press of a button. • Battery included with USB-C charging: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery rechargeable from any USB-C port without a mains charger; also works as a power bank for your devices. • Box contents: 1224e blower with tube fitted, ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah battery with 3-level LED display, USB-C cable.

product.name: RURIS VoltX 1264e – 60V Brushless Blower, 1200 m³/h, 72 m/s, Turbo, Battery and Charger Included
product.description:
The RURIS VoltX 1264e is a 60V cordless blower with a brushless motor (25,000 rpm) delivering 1200 m³/h and 72 m/s: it moves wet leaves and heavy debris across large yards, driveways and car parks. 3 speeds, a Turbo function and a variable-speed trigger for precise control. Supplied with an ALFA UP 6400e 60V 4Ah battery and charger included.
• 60V power: brushless motor at 25,000 rpm delivering an air flow of 1200 m³/h and 72 m/s, capable of moving wet leaves, light gravel and heavy debris. • Precise control: 3 speeds plus a Turbo function and a variable-speed trigger, from cleaning delicate surfaces to quickly covering large areas. • Ideal for large areas: designed for yards, driveways and car parks of 200 to 1000 m², without the fuel constraints of a petrol blower. • Comfortable to use: Soft Grip handle, vibrations limited to 2.15 m/s² and a contained weight of 4.5 kg for extended sessions. • Battery and charger included: RURIS ALFA UP 6400e 60V 4Ah Li-Ion battery (240 Wh) with digital display, compatible with all tools in the VoltX range.

product.name: RURIS 1244e – 3-in-1 Cordless Blower Vacuum Shredder 2x20V, 80 m/s, 45 L Bag, 2 Batteries Included
product.description:
The RURIS 1244e is a 3-in-1 cordless blower, vacuum and shredder with a 2x20V brushless motor (160 Wh): it blows at 80 m/s (650 m³/h), vacuums leaves and shreds them at a 12:1 ratio into its 45 L bag. Lightweight (3.5 kg) with a shoulder strap and adjustable handle, it is ideal for medium-sized gardens. Comes with 2 ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries with USB-C charging.
• 3 functions in 1: blow, vacuum and shred leaves with a single tool thanks to the 2x20V brushless motor running at 17,000 rpm (80 m/s, 650 m³/h). • 12:1 shredding: greatly reduces the volume of garden waste collected in the 45 L bag, meaning fewer trips to the composter. • Controlled airflow: 4 speeds plus a Turbo function to match the power to paths, lawns and patios, especially during autumn clean-up. • Light and comfortable: 3.5 kg with accessories, shoulder strap and adjustable secondary handle for extended use without fatigue. • 2 batteries included: ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah with 21700 cells and bidirectional USB-C charging, also usable as a power bank; USB-C cable supplied.

product.name: RURIS RTX 600 – Petrol Cut-Off Saw 58 cc 3.3 HP, 300 mm Disc, 100 mm Cutting Depth
product.description:
The RURIS RTX 600 petrol cut-off saw cuts concrete, asphalt, stone and metal right on the job site, with no cable or power supply needed. Its 58 cc 2-stroke engine (3.3 HP, up to 8500 rpm) drives a 300 mm disc at 4800 rpm, delivering a cutting depth of 100 mm. Lightweight (10.1 kg) and easy to handle, it runs on a petrol-oil mix (25 ml/L) with a 750 ml fuel tank.
• Powerful cutting: 58 cc, 3.3 HP 2-stroke engine driving the 300 mm disc at 4800 rpm, with a cutting depth of up to 100 mm. • Versatile: cuts concrete, asphalt, stone, slabs, kerbs, pavers, pipes and metal profiles on construction sites and roadworks. • Fully autonomous: petrol operation with no cable, engine speed up to 8500 rpm, 750 ml tank for the fuel mix (25 ml of oil per litre of petrol). • Light and manoeuvrable: only 10.1 kg for longer working sessions and access to hard-to-reach areas; manual start. • Built for the job site: compact disc cutter for construction, renovation and road work, for professionals and homeowners alike.

product.name: RURIS 1215 PP – Hose Reel with 15 m 1/2" Garden Hose, Wall-Mountable, Nozzle and Connectors Included
product.description:
The RURIS 1215 PP hose reel comes with an integrated 15-metre 1/2 inch garden hose, for a tidy garden and watering straight out of the box. Made of polypropylene, ABS and PVC, it withstands outdoor conditions and operates at 4 to 6 bar. Compact (30 x 26 x 27.5 cm) and lightweight, it can be placed freely or fixed to the wall with the 4 screws included. Watering nozzle, 1/2 inch connector and STOP connector supplied.
• Ready to water: hose reel supplied with an integrated 15 m, 1/2 inch (13 mm) hose, ready to use straight out of the box. • Tidy storage: the hose winds up neatly after every use — no more knots or hoses lying around the garden. • Durable construction: weather-resistant polypropylene, ABS and PVC; working pressure of 4 to 6 bar, temperature range 5 to 35 °C. • Compact and wall-mountable: dimensions 30 x 26 x 27.5 cm at 2.86 kg, with 4 wall-mounting screws included for a stable installation. • Box contents: reel with 15 m hose, 1/2 inch connector, 1/2 inch STOP connector, watering nozzle and 4 wall-mounting screws.

product.name: RURIS Expert 150 – Electric Garden Shredder 2600 W, 45 mm Branches, 45 L Collection Box, 2 Wheels
product.description:
The RURIS Expert 150 electric garden shredder chops branches, twigs and leaves up to 45 mm in diameter with its 2600 W motor (230 V mains) running at 4500 rpm. Its integrated 45 L collection box reduces how often you need to empty it, and its two sturdy wheels make it easy to move around the garden. Lightweight (12.1 kg), it produces chips ready to use as mulch or compost.
• 2600 W and 4500 rpm: 230 V mains-powered electric motor that continuously shreds branches, leaves and green waste without losing speed. • Branches up to 45 mm: suited to pruning waste from fruit trees, hedges and ornamental shrubs in gardens with regular output. • 45 L collection box: catches the chips directly beneath the machine and reduces the number of emptying stops while you work. • Easy to move: two sturdy wheels and a contained weight of 12.1 kg let you move the shredder without carrying it, even on unpaved ground. • Usable chips: the shredded material can be used as mulch to suppress weeds and retain moisture, or added to compost.

product.name: RURIS ST100S – Electric Garden Shredder 2400 W, 40 mm Branches, 50 L Bag, 4500 rpm
product.description:
The RURIS ST100S electric garden shredder turns branches and green waste into chips you can reuse as mulch or compost. Its 2400 W motor running at 4500 rpm shreds branches up to 40 mm in diameter, ideal for maintaining medium-sized gardens. Compact and quiet, it comes with a 50 L collection bag and moves easily thanks to its metal chassis on two wheels.
• Optimal power: 2400 W electric motor with a rotation speed of 4500 rpm for high shredding performance. • Cutting capacity: shreds branches and garden waste up to 40 mm in diameter, perfect for pruning hedges, shrubs and fruit trees. • Built-in protection: overload protection system that safeguards the motor and extends the machine's service life. • Clean work: 50 L collection bag to gather the chips, ready to reuse directly as mulch or in compost. • Easy transport: stable metal chassis and two sturdy wheels to move the shredder effortlessly around the whole garden.

product.name: RURIS ST200S – Electric Garden Shredder 2800 W, 45 mm Branches, 60 L Locking Collection Box
product.description:
The RURIS ST200S electric garden shredder efficiently reduces pruning waste thanks to its 2800 W motor and durable blades, capable of shredding branches up to 45 mm in diameter. Its 60 L collection box with a secure locking system only allows operation when the box is closed. Quiet and suitable for residential areas, it moves easily on its two wheels and stable chassis.
• High shredding power: robust 2800 W motor and durable blades to easily shred branches up to 45 mm in diameter. • Enhanced safety: the shredder only runs when the 60 L collection box is properly closed and locked. • Comfortable to use: quiet operation, suitable for residential areas without disturbing the neighbours. • Motor protection: built-in overload protection system that preserves the machine's performance over the long term. • Optimal mobility: two solid wheels and a stable frame to move the shredder easily around the garden.

product.name: RURIS TE400 – Electric Grass Trimmer 400 W, 200 mm Cutting Width, Telescopic Shaft, Lightweight 1.2 kg
product.description:
The RURIS TE400 electric grass trimmer handles lawn finishing and edging on small and medium-sized areas. Its 400 W motor runs at 14,000 rpm for a clean cut over a 20 cm width, with line fed out progressively and automatically. Ultra-light (1.2 kg) and fitted with a telescopic shaft and an ergonomic handle, it effortlessly reaches edges, foundations and tight corners.
• Fast, clean cutting: 400 W electric motor at 14,000 rpm for efficient lawn care and neat finishing work. • Precise in tricky areas: 200 mm cutting width, ideal along edges and foundations and around flower beds. • Adjustable telescopic shaft: length adapts to your height and working position for greater comfort. • Ultra-light: only 1.2 kg for effortless handling and reduced fatigue, even during extended use. • Automatic line feed: progressive cutting-line release system and ergonomic handle for full control, plugs straight into the mains.

product.name: RURIS TE500 PIVOT – Electric Grass Trimmer 500 W, 300 mm Cutting Width, Pivoting Head, Telescopic
product.description:
The RURIS TE500 PIVOT electric grass trimmer takes care of hard-to-reach areas: edges, paving joints and the ground around shrubs. Its 500 W motor at 14,000 rpm and pivoting dual-line head deliver a clean 300 mm cut at different angles, without constant repositioning. Telescopic adjustment and an ergonomic handle guarantee optimal comfort on mains power.
• Effective power: 500 W electric motor with a rotation speed of 14,000 rpm for fast, clean grass cutting. • Pivoting dual-line head: pivots in two directions to trim precisely at any angle, around shrubs and along paths. • Wide cutting swath: 300 mm width to quickly finish edges and areas the lawn mower cannot reach. • Comfortable to use: telescopic length adjustment and ergonomic handle to suit your working position. • Precision and smoothness: reduced vibration and automatic return of the cutting head to its initial position after use.

product.name: RURIS 2024e – Cordless Grass Trimmer, 300 mm Cutting Width, Lightweight 1.7 kg, 20V 4Ah USB-C Battery Included
product.description:
The RURIS 2024e is a lightweight (1.7 kg) cordless grass trimmer designed for lawn finishing around flower beds, trees and paths. It offers a 300 mm cutting diameter with 1.6 mm line and a rotating loop handle to adjust the working angle. RURIS ALFA UP 20V 4Ah Li-Ion battery included, with bidirectional USB-C charging: it recharges from any USB-C port and also works as a power bank. No mains charger needed.
• Precise, effortless finishing: 300 mm cutting diameter with 1.6 mm line for clean edges along paths, flower beds and trees, where the mower cannot reach. • Ultra-light and manoeuvrable: only 1.7 kg with a rotating loop handle that lets you adjust the cutting angle to the terrain and your working position. • 20V 4Ah battery included: RURIS ALFA UP 2400e Li-Ion battery with 3-level LED display, supplied with the tool so you can work straight out of the box. • Bidirectional USB-C charging: recharges from any USB-C port (computer, phone charger, car) and doubles as a power bank for your mobile devices. • Box contents: 2024e grass trimmer, 20V 4Ah USB-C battery, USB-C cable, 1.6 mm line head — no mains charger required.

product.name: RURIS FP7 – Manual Fruit Crusher, 7 L Stainless Steel Hopper, Aluminium Rollers, Apples and Pears, 7.2 kg
product.description:
The RURIS FP7 manual fruit crusher quickly processes generous quantities of apples, pears and other soft, stone-free fruit while preserving their natural quality. Its 7-litre stainless steel hopper resists corrosion, does not retain odours and does not alter the taste, while the aluminium rollers ensure uniform, gentle crushing. Compact (35 x 35 x 29 cm) and light at 7.2 kg, it fits in at the orchard as well as in the garden.
• 7 L stainless steel hopper: hygienic and corrosion-resistant, it retains no odours and preserves the authentic taste of the fruit. • Gentle crushing: aluminium rollers that ensure uniform crushing, respecting the structure of the fruit and the texture of the juice. • Manual crank operation: full control over the crushing, no motor, meaning minimal maintenance and long service life. • Compact and light: 35 x 35 x 29 cm at 7.2 kg, easy to carry and store, ideal for small spaces, the orchard or the garden. • Purpose-built: designed for apples, pears and soft, stone-free fruit, perfect for making homemade juice, cider and compotes.

product.name: RURIS 8024e – Cordless Pressure Washer 20V, 30 bar, Self-Priming, without Battery
product.description:
The RURIS 8024e is a fully autonomous 20V brushless cordless pressure washer: its self-priming system with float draws water from a bucket, a canister or any open container. With 30 bar of pressure and a flow rate of 5 L/min, it washes cars, bikes, garden furniture and tools anywhere, with no power socket or tap needed. Ultra-compact (1.5 kg), it comes in a carrying case, without battery or charger. Compatible with RURIS ALFA UP 20V.
• 30 bar without a cord: 20V brushless motor delivering 30 bar and 5 L/min to wash cars, bikes, furniture and tools anywhere, with no power socket or water supply. • Float-assisted self-priming: draws water directly from a bucket, canister or tank, ideal for camping, in the field or on the move. • Ultra-compact: only 1.5 kg with a carrying case included, easy to take along in the boot of the car. • Practical every day: instant trigger start, quiet operation and minimal maintenance. • Sold without battery or charger: compatible with RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries, to be ordered separately; one battery for all your RURIS 20V tools.

product.name: RURIS RMX1210 – Cordless SDS Plus Rotary Hammer 20V, 1.5 J, 900 rpm, LED, without Battery or Charger
product.description:
The RURIS RMX1210 cordless rotary hammer drills into concrete and masonry without a cable thanks to its SDS Plus chuck and 1.5 J of impact energy. With 900 rpm and 5100 blows/min, it drills concrete up to 16 mm, wood up to 25 mm and metal up to 10 mm. Compact (1.4 kg), with variable speed, forward/reverse switch and LED light. Supplied with 3 drill bits (8/10/12 mm), without battery or charger.
• Effective impact: 1.5 J of impact energy with 900 rpm and 5100 blows/min to drill concrete up to 16 mm, wood up to 25 mm and metal up to 10 mm. • Two working modes: plain drilling or hammer drilling, with an SDS Plus chuck for fast, tool-free bit changes. • Precise control: variable-speed trigger and rotation direction switch for drilling, driving screws and freeing jammed bits. • Light and handy: only 1.4 kg with a built-in LED light, ideal for working at height or in poorly lit areas. • Supplied without battery or charger: bare tool with 3 SDS Plus drill bits (8/10/12 mm), compatible with RURIS 20V batteries from the ALFA UP range.

product.name: RURIS RMX2813 – Brushless SDS Plus Rotary Hammer 20V, 2.8 J, without Battery or Charger
product.description:
The RURIS RMX2813 cordless rotary hammer combines a 20V brushless motor with an SDS Plus chuck for heavy-duty work. With 2.8 J of impact energy, 1150 rpm and 5100 blows/min, it drills concrete up to 26 mm, wood up to 30 mm and metal up to 13 mm. Four modes: drilling, hammer drilling, chiselling and Variolock for positioning the chisel. Supplied with 3 drill bits (8/10/12 mm) and a depth stop, without battery or charger.
• High impact power: 2.8 J of impact energy, 1150 rpm and 5100 blows/min to drill concrete up to 26 mm, wood up to 30 mm and metal up to 13 mm. • 4 working modes: drilling, hammer drilling, chiselling and Variolock to lock the chisel at the optimal angle, without constant repositioning. • 20V brushless motor: higher efficiency, less wear and long service life, with the power of a corded rotary hammer without the cable. • Precise, comfortable work: depth stop, variable speed and LED light for consistent drilling, even in dark areas. • Supplied without battery or charger: bare tool with 3 SDS Plus drill bits (8/10/12 mm) and a depth stop, compatible with RURIS 20V ALFA UP batteries.

product.name: RURIS 2624e – Cordless Chainsaw 20V, 30 cm Bar, SDS Tensioning, without Battery or Charger
product.description:
The RURIS 2624e is a 20V cordless chainsaw running at 3600 rpm, fitted with a 30 cm bar giving a cutting length of 275 mm, ideal for pruning and small-diameter wood. The SDS tensioning system adjusts the chain without tools, and automatic lubrication (210 ml reservoir) protects the chain continuously. Compatible with the RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V battery. Supplied without battery or charger.
• Clean battery-powered cutting: 20V motor at 3600 rpm with a 30 cm bar and 275 mm cutting length, for pruning and cutting small-diameter wood. • Tool-free adjustment: the SDS tensioning system lets you adjust the chain in seconds, right on the job. • Automatic lubrication: 210 ml oil reservoir providing continuous protection of the chain and bar for extended service life. • Quiet and light: instant trigger start, with no starter cord, fuel mix or exhaust fumes; perfect for everyday garden work. • Sold without battery or charger: compatible with the RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V battery, to be ordered separately; one battery for all your RURIS 20V tools.

product.name: RURIS 2744e – Brushless Cordless Chainsaw 40V, 400 mm Bar, 25 m/s, without Battery or Charger
product.description:
The RURIS 2744e is a brushless 40V (2x20V) cordless chainsaw equipped with a 400 mm bar and a chain running at 25 m/s, for fast, precise cuts on trunks up to 395 mm. Its 2-speed variable trigger, tool-free SDS tensioner and dual chain brake provide control and safety in every situation. Supplied without battery or charger.
• 40V brushless power: 400 mm bar and 25 m/s chain to fell and cut trunks up to 395 mm, with the output of a light petrol chainsaw. • Full control: 2-speed variable trigger to match the cut to the wood, from fine limbing to bucking firewood. • Tool-free maintenance: SDS system to tension the chain and change the bar in seconds, right in the field. • Safety and comfort: dual chain brake and vibration reduced to 1.76 m/s² for extended cutting sessions with complete peace of mind. • Without battery or charger: bare tool, requires 2 RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries; share the batteries from your other RURIS 20V tools.

product.name: RURIS 2844e – Cordless Brushless Chainsaw 40V, 30 cm Bar, 3.8 kg, Battery Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS 2844e is an ultra-light 40V (2x20V) brushless cordless chainsaw: just 3.8 kg for maximum manoeuvrability when pruning and trimming trees. Its 30 cm bar delivers a cutting length of 285 mm, the SDS system adjusts the chain without tools and the double chain brake enhances safety. Compatible with RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V batteries. Supplied without batteries or charger.
• Ultra-light at 3.8 kg: one of the lightest 40V brushless chainsaws in its class, for pruning and trimming at height without fatigue. • Efficient cutting: brushless 2x20V (40V) motor, 30 cm bar and 285 mm cutting length, suited to everyday garden maintenance work. • Tool-free SDS tensioning: instant chain adjustment in the field, with no wrench or screwdriver required. • Enhanced safety: double chain brake and optimal machine balance to reduce risk and fatigue during extended work. • Sold without batteries or charger: requires 2 RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V batteries, ordered separately; share batteries across your RURIS 20V tool range.

product.name: RURIS VoltX 6064e – Cordless Brushless Hedge Trimmer 60V, 650 mm Blade, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS VoltX 6064e is a 60V brushless cordless hedge trimmer whose 650 mm (26 inch) dual-action blade cuts branches up to 30 mm in diameter without jamming. Its rear handle rotates into 5 positions for easy horizontal, angled and vertical cuts without straining your wrists, and its multifunction display shows battery level and speed. Weight: 3.75 kg. Supplied without battery or charger.
• 60V brushless power: 650 mm (26 inch) dual-action blade cutting branches up to 30 mm in diameter, with performance close to a petrol hedge trimmer. • 5-position rotating handle: cut horizontally, at an angle or vertically without twisting your wrists or changing your posture. • Multifunction display: check battery level and the selected speed at a glance to match your cutting to the density of the hedge. • Light and manoeuvrable: only 3.75 kg with a low-vibration dual-action blade, for maintaining tall hedges and thick shrubs without fatigue. • Battery and charger not included: tool sold alone, compatible with the RURIS VoltX 60V range; ALFA UP 6400e battery and 64e charger ordered separately.

product.name: RURIS RMX3140 – Cordless Circular Saw 20V, 140 mm Blade, 50 mm Cutting Depth, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX3140 cordless circular saw with 20V brushless motor spins at 6800 rpm with a 140 mm blade, cutting wood and panels up to 50 mm deep. Adjustable angle from 0 to 45° for bevel cuts, graduated base plate, width limiter and LED light, all at just 1.8 kg. Supplied with a 140 mm blade, without battery or charger: compatible with ALFA UP 20V.
• 6800 rpm brushless motor: 140 mm blade for clean, fast cuts in wood and panels, with no cord and no power socket. • Ideal for DIY and home improvement: cuts boards, skirting, panels and battens on the move, even at height thanks to its 1.8 kg weight. • Precise, adjustable cuts: depth up to 50 mm, angle adjustable from 0 to 45°, graduated base plate and width limiter for straight and bevel cuts. • Comfort and visibility: LED light for poorly lit areas and a lightweight grip for working longer without fatigue. • Sold without battery or charger: compatible with all RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries, ordered separately; supplied with a 140 mm blade fitted.

product.name: RURIS RMX3260 – Cordless Brushless Jigsaw 20V, 3800 rpm, LED, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX3260 cordless jigsaw makes precise cuts in wood, metal and plastic thanks to its 20V brushless motor running at 3800 rpm. Its 5 speeds plus automatic mode, 4 pendulum positions and adjustable angle up to 45° adapt to every material. Easy Lock system, LED light and 4 blades included. Supplied without battery or charger, compatible with RURIS 20V batteries.
