• Powerful 20V brushless motor: up to 3800 rpm and a 26 mm blade stroke for fast, clean cuts in wood, metal, plastic and aluminium. • Versatile settings: 5 speeds plus automatic mode and 4 pendulum positions to match the cut to each material, with a tilt angle of up to 45° left and right. • Tool-free blade change: Easy Lock system to swap blades in seconds, with a dust blower to keep the cutting line visible. • Comfort and precision: built-in LED light and a balanced grip for curved or detailed cuts, even in poorly lit areas. • Supplied without battery or charger: bare tool with 4 blades (100 x 1.5 x 45 mm), compatible with RURIS 20V batteries from the ALFA UP range.

product.name: RURIS 30024e – Portable Power Station 300 W, AC 240V, USB-C, DC 12V, LED Lamp, Batteries Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS 30024e is a 300 W portable inverter that automatically switches from one battery to the next with no interruption, and also works as a quad charger when plugged into the mains. Its AC 240V, USB-C 18W, 2x USB-A and DC 12V/5A outputs power several devices at once, and its 7.2 W LED lamp comes to the rescue when camping or during power cuts. Supplied without batteries (takes up to 4 ALFA UP 2400e batteries).
• 300 W power station: powers your devices at 230 V from RURIS 20V batteries, with automatic switching between batteries and no interruption. • Practical 2-in-1: plugged into the mains, it becomes a quad charger and recharges up to 4 RURIS ALFA UP 2400e batteries simultaneously with no separate chargers. • Portable power strip: AC 240V, USB-C 18W fast-charge, 2x USB-A 5V/2A and DC 12V/5A outputs to run several devices at the same time. • Built-in 7.2 W LED lamp: instant emergency lighting for camping, the worksite or power outages. • Sold without batteries: complete it with up to 4 RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V 4Ah batteries; reuse the batteries from your RURIS 20V tools.

product.name: RURIS RMX1390 – Cordless Drill Driver 20V 130 Nm, 3-16 mm Chuck, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX1390 multifunction cordless drill driver with 20V brushless motor delivers 130 Nm, drilling metal up to 13 mm and wood up to 150 mm with the supplied earth auger bit. 2 speeds (0-300 / 0-1200 rpm), 3-16 mm chuck, side handle mountable in 3 positions and LED. Supplied with an 80x300 mm earth auger bit, D-handle and drill bit set, without battery or charger: compatible with ALFA UP 20V.
• High 130 Nm torque: brushless motor capable of drilling metal up to 13 mm and wood up to 150 mm with the supplied earth auger bit. • Multifunctional: heavy-duty drilling and screwdriving in wood and metal, including deep holes for posts and planting thanks to the 80x300 mm earth auger bit. • 2 speeds and 3-16 mm chuck: slow high-torque speed (0-300 rpm) for hard materials, fast speed (0-1200 rpm) for everyday drilling. • Secure grip: side handle mountable in 3 positions, D-handle with extension and LED light for dark areas; weight 2.4 kg. • Sold without battery or charger: compatible with RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries; supplied with chuck key, adapter, 80x300 mm earth auger bit, D-handle and a set of metal and wood drill bits.

product.name: RURIS RMX1360 – Cordless Brushless Hammer Drill Driver 20V, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX1360 cordless hammer drill driver with 20V brushless motor combines 3 functions: drilling, screwdriving and hammer drilling for brick and lightweight concrete. Its torque adjustment ring protects screws and materials, and its keyless chuck speeds up accessory changes. Compact, with LED light, it is sold without battery or charger: compatible with ALFA UP 20V.
• 3 functions in 1: drilling, screwdriving and hammer drilling for working wood, metal, brick and lightweight concrete without changing tools. • 20V brushless motor: better efficiency and longer life than brushed motors, for regular use in all-round DIY. • Torque adjustment: adjustment ring to protect screws and materials, plus a switchable hammer mode for light masonry. • Practical and manoeuvrable: keyless chuck, LED light for dark areas and a compact, cord-free format. • Sold without battery or charger: compatible with all RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries, ordered separately; share a single battery across your RURIS 20V tools.

product.name: RURIS RMX1260 – Cordless Brushless Drill Driver 20V 60 Nm, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX1260 cordless drill driver with 20V brushless motor delivers a maximum torque of 60 Nm for drilling and screwdriving in wood, metal and plastic. Its 2 speeds (0-450 / 0-2000 rpm), 20+1 torque settings and 0-10 mm metal chuck guarantee precision and comfort, with LED. Supplied with 5 screwdriver bits and 7 drill bits (3-10 mm), without battery or charger: compatible with ALFA UP 20V.
• 60 Nm torque and brushless motor: drills and drives in wood, metal and plastic with efficiency and durability superior to brushed motors. • Versatile for everyday use: perfect for DIY, furniture assembly and fixing jobs, at home or in the workshop. • Precise control: 2 speeds (0-450 / 0-2000 rpm) and 20+1 torque settings to protect screws and materials; keyless 0-10 mm metal chuck. • Light and comfortable: only 0.88 kg, with LED light and charge indicator for working easily in dark areas. • Sold without battery or charger: compatible with RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries; supplied with 5 screwdriver bits and 7 drill bits (3-10 mm).

product.name: RURIS RMX1240 – Cordless Drill Driver 20V 40 Nm, 2 Speeds, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX1240 cordless drill driver with 20V brushless motor develops 40 Nm of torque, drilling wood up to 25 mm and metal up to 10 mm. Its 2 speeds (0-400 / 0-1350 rpm), 20+1 torque settings and 0-10 mm metal chuck ensure precise screwdriving, with LED light. Supplied with 8 bits, 8 drill bits, magnetic adapter and countersink bit, without battery or charger.
• 40 Nm torque and brushless motor: drills wood up to 25 mm and metal up to 10 mm, with efficiency and lifespan superior to brushed motors. • Versatile for everyday use: ideal for drilling and screwdriving in DIY and intensive use alike, in wood, metal and plastic. • Precise control: 2 speeds (0-400 / 0-1350 rpm) and 20+1 torque settings to protect screws and materials; keyless 0-10 mm metal chuck. • Comfortable to use: LED light for dark areas and a low weight of 0.94 kg for working long hours without fatigue. • Sold without battery or charger: compatible with RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries; supplied with 8 screwdriver bits, 8 drill bits (2-6 mm), magnetic adapter and countersink bit.

product.name: RURIS RMX2300 – Cordless Impact Driver 20V 230 Nm, 1/4 Hex, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX2300 cordless impact driver with 20V brushless motor delivers 230 Nm, 3300 rpm and 4500 impacts per minute to drive and remove M8 to M18 screws effortlessly. 1/4 inch hex drive, torque adjustable across 3 levels, Reversal Stop function and LED light, all at just 0.94 kg. Sold without battery or charger, it is compatible with RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries.
• 230 Nm torque and brushless motor: 3300 rpm and 4500 impacts per minute to drive bolts and long M8-M18 screws where a standard drill driver stalls. • Ideal for assembling structures, construction and mechanics: ultra-compact 0.94 kg format to reach tight spaces and drive screw after screw. • 1/4 inch (6.35 mm) hex drive: quick bit changes; torque adjustable across 3 levels and Reversal Stop function to avoid damaging screws. • Comfort and control: LED light and charge indicator for working precisely, even in dark areas. • Sold without battery or charger: compatible with all RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries, ordered separately; share a single battery across your RURIS 20V tools.

product.name: RURIS RMX3500 – Cordless Impact Wrench 20V 350 Nm, 1/2 Square Drive, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX3500 cordless impact wrench with 20V brushless motor develops an extreme torque of 350 Nm, 0-2400 rpm and 3300 impacts per minute for heavy-duty bolting and M8 to M18 screws. Its 1/2 inch square drive accepts standard impact sockets; torque adjustable across 3 levels, Reversal Stop and LED. Sold without battery or charger, compatible with RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries.
• Extreme 350 Nm torque: brushless motor at 3300 impacts per minute to tighten and loosen large bolts up to M18 without effort. • Ideal for car mechanics, bolting and construction: frees wheels, seized nuts and stuck fasteners. • 1/2 inch square drive: compatible with standard impact sockets; torque adjustable across 3 levels and Reversal Stop function for precise control. • Compact and comfortable: only 1 kg, with LED light and charge indicator for working efficiently anywhere. • Sold without battery or charger: compatible with all RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries, ordered separately; share a single battery across your RURIS 20V tools.

product.name: RURIS 3144e – Cordless Brushless Brush Cutter 40V, Trimmer Line + 3-Tooth Blade, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS 3144e is a cordless brush cutter with a 40V (2x20V) brushless motor offering torque comparable to entry-level petrol models, with no fuel and no engine maintenance. Its dual cutting system — a 300 mm line head and a 255 mm 3-tooth blade — moves from edge finishing to woody undergrowth. Practical modular shaft for easy transport. Supplied without battery or charger.
• 40V brushless power: the torque of a light petrol brush cutter from two 20V batteries, with no fuel, no fumes and minimal maintenance. • Dual cutting system: 300 mm line head for finishing and edging, 255 mm 3-tooth blade for tall grass and woody vegetation. • Modular shaft: splits into two parts for easy transport in the boot and storage at home. • Comfortable to use: only 4.97 kg, with no pull-start and none of the vibrations of a petrol engine, so you can work longer without fatigue. • Battery and charger not included: tool sold alone, requires 2 RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries; ideal if you already own batteries from the 20V range.

product.name: RURIS 4044e – Cordless Brushless Tiller 40V, 30 cm Working Width, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS 4044e is a compact, lightweight (9.65 kg) cordless tiller powered by a 40V (2x20V) brushless motor. With a working width of 30 cm and a depth of 20 cm, it quickly loosens the soil in vegetable gardens, greenhouses and flower beds, with no cord and no fuel. Its very low vibrations (0.78 m/s²) and instant start make it a pleasure to use. Compatible with RURIS ALFA UP 20V. Supplied without batteries or charger.
• Cordless electric tiller: 40V (2x20V) brushless motor that loosens and prepares the soil with no fuel, cord or exhaust fumes. • Ideal for vegetable gardens and greenhouses: 30 cm working width and 20 cm depth, perfect for previously cultivated soil, flower beds and small plots. • Remarkable comfort: very low vibrations of 0.78 m/s² and a contained weight of 9.65 kg for tilling long sessions without fatigue. • Ready in an instant: immediate trigger start, with no pull cord or petrol mix, and maintenance kept to a minimum. • Sold without batteries or charger: requires 2 RURIS ALFA UP 2400e 20V batteries, ordered separately; share batteries across your RURIS 20V tool range.

product.name: RURIS RMX4125 – Cordless Angle Grinder 20V, 125 mm Disc, 8500 rpm, Battery and Charger Not Included
product.description:
The RURIS RMX4125 cordless angle grinder with 20V brushless motor cuts and grinds metal and stone with its 125 mm disc and 2 speeds (2600 and 8500 rpm). A disc lock button, adjustable protective guard and charge indicator provide safety and comfort at just 1.6 kg. Supplied with a 125 mm disc and auxiliary handle, without battery or charger: compatible with ALFA UP 20V.
• 2-speed brushless motor: 2600 rpm for sanding and finishing, 8500 rpm for cutting, with a 125 mm disc compatible with standard accessories. • Versatile and mobile: cuts and grinds metal and stone anywhere, with no cord or socket, where a corded grinder is limited. • Quick accessory change: disc lock button and a protective guard with adjustable position for working safely. • Light and manoeuvrable: only 1.6 kg, with a 2-position auxiliary handle and a charge indicator for constant monitoring. • Sold without battery or charger: compatible with RURIS ALFA UP 20V batteries, ordered separately; supplied with a 125 mm disc and auxiliary handle.
